@command_block ÁöĄśĖáÁę†„ÄäNTT šłéŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚÖ®Śģ∂ś°∂„ÄčšĽ•ŚŹä @Epsilon_Cube„ÄĀ@MoYuFang ŚíĆ @Diu ÁĽôšļąśąĎÁöĄŤģłŚ§öŚłģŚä©„Äā Śõ†šłļśĚŅŚ≠źŚú®šłćśĖ≠šŅģ bugÔľĆśČÄšĽ•šĽ£Á†ĀśúÄŚźéÁĽüšłÄśĒĺ„Äā ŚČćÁĹģŤäĚŚ£ę Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄŚźĄÁßćŤŅźÁģóśėĮśÄéšĻąŚģöšĻČÁöĄ ÁĒĪšļéśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™Áü•ťĀďŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚä†ś≥ēŚíĆŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹšĻėś≥ēÔľĆšĹÜśėĮŤŅôŚ∑≤ÁĽŹŚ§üšļÜ„ÄāśČÄšĽ•śČÄśúČÁöĄŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŤŅźÁģóťÉĹśėĮÁĒ®Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹŚä†ś≥ēŚíĆšĻėś≥ēŚģöšĻČÁöĄ„Äā ś¨°śēįÁēĆ ŚĺąŚ§öśó∂ŚÄôśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™ŚĮĻŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹ fff ÁöĄŚČć nnn ť°ĻśĄüŚÖīŤ∂£ÔľąŤŅôśó∂ŚĺÄŚĺÄ fff šľöśúČśó†ťôźť°ĻÔľČÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ťúÄŤ¶ĀŚú® (modxn)\\pmod{x^n}(modxn) ÁöĄśĄŹšĻČšłčŤŅźÁģó„Äā ÁĒĪšļéŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚä†ś≥ēŚíĆŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹšĻėś≥ēÁöĄÁĽďśěúŚŹ™šľöšĽéšĹéś¨°ť°ĻŚźĎťęėś¨°ť°ĻŤī°ÁĆģÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śúČÔľö F(x)mod‚Ā°xn+G(x)mod‚Ā°xn‚Č°F(x)+G(x)(modxn)F(x)mod‚Ā°xn‚čÖG(x)mod‚Ā°xn‚Č°F(x)G(x)(modxn)\\begin{aligned} F(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}+G(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}&\\equiv F(x)+G(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ F(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}\\cdot G(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}&\\equiv F(x)G(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} F(x)modxn+G(x)modxnF(x)modxn‚čÖG(x)modxn‚Äč‚Č°F(x)+G(x)‚Č°F(x)G(x)‚Äč(modxn)(modxn)‚Äč Ść≥śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•Śú®śúČś¨°śēįÁēĆÁöĄśÉÖŚÜĶšłčŚģöšĻČśČÄśúČŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŤŅźÁģó„Äā ÁģÄŚćēŚĺģÁßĮŚąÜ šłÄšļõŤģįŚŹ∑ [xi]F(x)[x^i]F(x)[xi]F(x)ÔľöŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹ F(x)F(x)F(x) ÁöĄ iii ś¨°ť°ĻÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįÔľĆŚć≥ xix^ixi ÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįÔľõ FR(x)F_R(x)FR‚Äč(x)Ôľönnn ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄÁŅĽŤĹ¨ FR(x)=xnF(1x)F_R(x)=x^nF(\\frac{1}{x})FR‚Äč(x)=xnF(x1‚Äč)ÔľĆśėĺÁĄ∂ FR(x)F_R(x)FR‚Äč(x) ÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįśėĮ F(x)F(x)F(x) ÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįÁöĄÁŅĽŤĹ¨Ôľõ F(n)(x)F^{(n)}(x)F(n)(x)ÔľöŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹ F(x)F(x)F(x) ÁöĄ nnn ťė∂ŚĮľśēįÔľĆŚć≥ŚĮĻ F(x)F(x)F(x) śĪāŚĮľ nnn ś¨°ÁöĄÁĽďśěúÔľõ Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹśĪāŚĮľŚíĆÁßĮŚąÜ ŚģöšĻČŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄśĪāŚĮľÔľö F‚Ä≤(x)=‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ai+1(i+1)xiF^\\prime(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1} a_{i+1}(i+1)x^{i} F‚Ä≤(x)=i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčai+1‚Äč(i+1)xi ŚģöšĻČŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄÁßĮŚąÜÔľąšłćŚģöÁßĮŚąÜÔľČÔľö ‚ąęF(x) dx=C+‚ąĎi=1nai‚ąí1xii\\int F(x)\\,dx=C+\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{n} \\dfrac{a_{i-1}x^{i}}{i} ‚ąęF(x)dx=C+i=1‚ąĎn‚Äčiai‚ąí1‚Äčxi‚Äč ŚźĆś†∑ÁöĄÔľĆŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹśĪāŚĮľŚíĆÁßĮŚąÜšĻüśėĮšļíšłļťÄÜśďćšĹú„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÁČõť°ŅŤŅ≠šĽ£ ŤŅôśėĮšłÄšł™śĮĒŤĺÉťáćŤ¶ĀÁöĄÁü•ŤĮÜÔľĆśúČšļÜŚģÉÔľĆŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•śó†ŤĄĎśé®Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹŚźĄÁßćśďćšĹúÁöĄťÄíśé®ŚľŹšļÜ„Äā ŚĹĘŚľŹÔľöŚ∑≤Áü•ŚáĹśēį GGG śĽ°Ť∂≥ G(F(x))=0G(F(x))=0G(F(x))=0ÔľĆśĪā F(x)mod‚Ā°xnF(x)\\operatorname{mod} x^nF(x)modxn„Äā ŚģěŤ∑Ķšł≠ GGG šłÄŤą¨ŤĺÉšłļśČčŚä®śěĄťÄ†ÁöĄÁģÄŚćēŚáĹśēį„Äā ÁĽďŤģļÔľöF(x)‚Č°F‚ąó(x)‚ąíG(F‚ąó(x))G‚Ä≤(F‚ąó(x))(modxn)F(x)\\equiv F_*(x)-\\dfrac{G(F_*(x))}{G'(F_*(x))}\\pmod{x^n}F(x)‚Č°F‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíG‚Ä≤(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))G(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚Äč(modxn)ÔľĆŚÖ∂šł≠ F‚ąó(x)‚Č°F(x)(modxn2)F_*(x)\\equiv F(x)\\pmod{x^{\\frac{n}{2}}}F‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚Č°F(x)(modx2n‚Äč)ÔľĆś≥®śĄŹ [x0]G(F(x))=0[x^0]G(F(x))=0[x0]G(F(x))=0 ÁöĄŤß£Ť¶ĀŚćēÁč¨śĪāŚáļ„Äā ŚíĆšłÄŤą¨ÁöĄÁČõŤŅ≠ŚćĀŚąÜÁõłšľľÔľĆšĹÜśėĮś¨°śēįśĮŹś¨°ÁŅĽŚÄć„ÄāŤĮĀśėéŚ¶āšłčÔľö ŚĀáŤģĺÁõģŚČćŚ∑≤ÁĽŹśĪāŚáļšļÜ F‚ąó(x)F_*(x)F‚ąó‚Äč(x)ÔľĆŤÄÉŤôĎ G(F(x))G(F(x))G(F(x))Śú® F‚ąó(x)F_*(x)F‚ąó‚Äč(x) Ś§ĄÁöĄś≥įŚčíŚĪēŚľÄÔľö ‚ąĎi=0‚ąěG(i)(F‚ąó(x))i!(F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó(x))i‚Č°0(modxn)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{\\infin} \\frac{G^{(i)}(F_*(x))}{i!}(F(x)-F_*(x))^i\\equiv0\\pmod{x^n} i=0‚ąĎ‚ąě‚Äči!G(i)(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚Äč(F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó‚Äč(x))i‚Č°0(modxn) ś≥®śĄŹŚąį F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó(x)F(x)-F_*(x)F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó‚Äč(x) ÁöĄśúÄšĹéÁ≥ĽśēįťĚě 000 ť°ĻŤá≥ŚįĎśėĮ xn2x^{\\frac{n}{2}}x2n‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąŚĮĻšļéśČÄśúČ i‚Č•2i\\ge2i‚Č•2 ÁöĄ iii ťÉĹśúČ (F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó(x))i‚Č°0(modxn)(F(x)-F_*(x))^i\\equiv 0\\pmod{x^n}(F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó‚Äč(x))i‚Č°0(modxn)ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•Ôľö G(F‚ąó(x))+G‚Ä≤(F‚ąó(x))(F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó(x))‚Č°0(modxn)F(x)‚Č°F‚ąó(x)‚ąíG(F‚ąó(x))G‚Ä≤(F‚ąó(x))(modxn)\\begin{aligned} G(F_*(x))+G'(F_*(x))(F(x)-F_*(x))&\\equiv0&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ F(x)&\\equiv F_*(x)-\\frac{G(F_*(x))}{G'(F_*(x))}&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} G(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))+G‚Ä≤(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))(F(x)‚ąíF‚ąó‚Äč(x))F(x)‚Äč‚Č°0‚Č°F‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíG‚Ä≤(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))G(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚Äč‚Äč(modxn)(modxn)‚Äč ŤĮĀśĮē„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹšĻėś≥ēťÄÜ P4238 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹšĻėś≥ēťÄÜ ŚĀáŤģĺŚ∑≤ÁĽŹśĪāŚáļšļÜ B‚ąó(x)F(x)‚Č°1(modxn2)B_*(x)F(x)\\equiv 1\\pmod{x^{\\frac{n}{2}}}B‚ąó‚Äč(x)F(x)‚Č°1(modx2n‚Äč)ÔľĆÁéįŚú®Ť¶ĀśĪā B(x)F(x)‚Č°1(modxn)B(x)F(x)\\equiv1\\pmod{x^n}B(x)F(x)‚Č°1(modxn)ÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö G(B(x))=1B(x)‚ąíF(x)‚Č°0(modxn)\\begin{aligned} G(B(x))=\\frac{1}{B(x)}-F(x)\\equiv 0\\pmod{x^n} \\end{aligned} G(B(x))=B(x)1‚Äč‚ąíF(x)‚Č°0(modxn)‚Äč ŚąôŚŹĮšĽ•Áõīśé•Ś•óÁČõť°ŅŤŅ≠šĽ£Ôľö B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)‚ąíG(B‚ąó(x))G‚Ä≤(B‚ąó(x))(modxn)B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)‚ąí1B‚ąó(x)‚ąíF(x)‚ąí1B‚ąó2(x)(modxn)B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)+B‚ąó(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2F(x)(modxn)B(x)‚Č°2B‚ąó(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2F(x)(modxn)\\begin{aligned} B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{G(B_*(x))}{G'(B_*(x))}&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{\\frac{1}{B_*(x)}-F(x)}{-\\frac{1}{B_*^2(x)}}&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)+B_*(x)-B_*^2F(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv 2B_*(x)-B_*^2F(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} B(x)B(x)B(x)B(x)‚Äč‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíG‚Ä≤(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))G(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚Äč‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąí‚ąíB‚ąó2‚Äč(x)1‚ÄčB‚ąó‚Äč(x)1‚Äč‚ąíF(x)‚Äč‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)+B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2‚ÄčF(x)‚Č°2B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2‚ÄčF(x)‚Äč(modxn)(modxn)(modxn)(modxn)‚Äč ťā£šĻąŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•ŚĀöšļÜÔľĆ[x0]B(x)[x^0]B(x)[x0]B(x) ťúÄŤ¶ĀśĪāšłÄś¨°šĻėś≥ēťÄÜŚÖÉÔľĆśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶šłļ T(n)=T(n2)+O(nlog‚Ā°n)=O(nlog‚Ā°n)T(n)=T(\\frac{n}{2})+O(n\\log n)=O(n\\log n)T(n)=T(2n‚Äč)+O(nlogn)=O(nlogn)„Äā šłćŤŅáŤŅėśúČšł™šľėŚĆĖÔľĆś≥®śĄŹŚąį NTT ÁöĄŤŅáÁ®čšĽ£ŚÖ•ÁöĄśėĮŚćēšĹćś†ĻÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śĪāÁöĄŚģěťôÖšłäśėĮŚĺ™ÁéĮŚć∑ÁßĮÔľö F(x)G(x)=‚ąĎk=0mxk‚ąĎi+jmod m=kfigjF(x)G(x)=\\sum\\limits_{k=0}^mx^k\\sum\\limits_{i+j\\mod m=k} f_ig_j F(x)G(x)=k=0‚ąĎm‚Äčxki+jmodm=k‚ąĎ‚Äčfi‚Äčgj‚Äč ŤßāŚĮüŚÄćŚĘěŚľŹŚ≠źÔľö B(x)‚Č°2B‚ąó(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2(x)F(x)(modxn)B(x)\\equiv 2B_*(x)-B_*^2(x)F(x)\\pmod{x^n} B(x)‚Č°2B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2‚Äč(x)F(x)(modxn) ťúÄŤ¶ĀÁĒ®ŚąįšĻėś≥ēÁöĄŚŹ™śúČ B‚ąó2(x)F(x)B_*^2(x)F(x)B‚ąó2‚Äč(x)F(x)„Äā ŚÖąŤģ°Áģó B‚ąó(x)F(x)B_*(x)F(x)B‚ąó‚Äč(x)F(x)ÔľĆŚģÉšĽ¨ÁöĄś¨°śēįŚąÜŚąęśėĮ len2\\dfrac{len}{2}2len‚Äč ŚíĆ lenlenlen„Äā ÁĒĪšļéÁĽďśěúÁöĄÁ¨¨šłÄť°Ļšłļ 111ÔľĆŤŅôšł™ 111 ŚźéťĚĘÁöĄ len2‚ąí1\\dfrac{len}{2}-12len‚Äč‚ąí1 ť°ĻťÉĹšłļ 000ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ťēŅŚļ¶šłļ lenlenlen ÁöĄŚĺ™ÁéĮŚć∑ÁßĮŚŹ™šľöÁ†īŚĚŹŚČćťĚĘÁöĄ 111 ŚíĆ 000„Äā śúÄŚźéšĻėšłäšłÄšł™ B‚ąó(x)B_*(x)B‚ąó‚Äč(x) Ść≥ŚŹĮÔľĆś≠§śó∂Śĺ™ÁéĮŚć∑ÁßĮŚŹ™šľöÁ†īŚĚŹŚČć len2\\dfrac{len}{2}2len‚Äč ť°Ļ„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹŚľÄś†Ļ P5205 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚľÄś†Ļ P5277 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚľÄś†ĻÔľąŚä†ŚľļÁČąÔľČ ŚĀáŤģĺŚ∑≤ÁĽŹśĪāŚáļšļÜ B‚ąó2(x)‚Č°F(x)(modxn2)B_*^2(x)\\equiv F(x)\\pmod{x^{\\frac{n}{2}}}B‚ąó2‚Äč(x)‚Č°F(x)(modx2n‚Äč)ÔľĆÁéįŚú®Ť¶ĀśĪā B(x)2‚Č°F(x)(modxn)B(x)^2\\equiv F(x)\\pmod{x^n}B(x)2‚Č°F(x)(modxn)ÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö G(B(x))=B2(x)‚ąíF(x)‚Č°0(modxn)G(B(x))=B^2(x)-F(x)\\equiv 0\\pmod{x^n} G(B(x))=B2(x)‚ąíF(x)‚Č°0(modxn) Áõīśé•Ś•óÁČõŤŅ≠Ôľö B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)‚ąíG(B‚ąó(x))G‚Ä≤(B‚ąó(x))(mod2n)B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)‚ąíB‚ąó2(x)‚ąíF(x)2B‚ąó(x)(mod2n)B(x)‚Č°2B‚ąó(x)2‚ąíB‚ąó2(x)+F(x)2B‚ąó(x)(mod2n)B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó2(x)+F(x)2B‚ąó(x)(mod2n)\\begin{aligned} B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{G(B_*(x))}{G'(B_*(x))}&\\pmod{2^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{B_*^2(x)-F(x)}{2B_*(x)}&\\pmod{2^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv \\frac{2B_*(x)^2-B_*^2(x)+F(x)}{2B_*(x)}&\\pmod{2^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv \\frac{B_*^2(x)+F(x)}{2B_*(x)}&\\pmod{2^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} B(x)B(x)B(x)B(x)‚Äč‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíG‚Ä≤(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))G(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚Äč‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąí2B‚ąó‚Äč(x)B‚ąó2‚Äč(x)‚ąíF(x)‚Äč‚Č°2B‚ąó‚Äč(x)2B‚ąó‚Äč(x)2‚ąíB‚ąó2‚Äč(x)+F(x)‚Äč‚Č°2B‚ąó‚Äč(x)B‚ąó2‚Äč(x)+F(x)‚Äč‚Äč(mod2n)(mod2n)(mod2n)(mod2n)‚Äč śúÄŚźé [x0]B(x)[x^0]B(x)[x0]B(x) ťúÄŤ¶ĀśĪāšłÄś¨°šļĆś¨°ŚČ©šĹôÔľĆŚŹĮšĽ•ÁĒ® BSGS/exBSGS śĪāŚćēšĹćś†ĻÁöĄťęėś¨°ŚźĆšĹôśĖĻÁ®čśĚ•śĪāŤß£ÔľĆŚÜćŚä†šłäšłÄšł™śĪāťÄÜÔľĆšłÄšł™šĻėś≥ēÔľĆšłÄšł™Śä†ś≥ēŚįĪŚĀöŚģĆšļÜ„Äā śó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶šłļ T(n)=T(n2)+O(nlog‚Ā°n)=O(nlog‚Ā°n)T(n)=T(\\frac{n}{2})+O(n\\log n)=O(n\\log n)T(n)=T(2n‚Äč)+O(nlogn)=O(nlogn)„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹ ln‚Ā°\\lnln P4725 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚĮĻśēįŚáĹśēįÔľąŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹ lnÔľČ ln‚Ā°(A(x))‚Č°B(x)(modxn)\\ln(A(x))\\equiv B(x)\\pmod{x^n} ln(A(x))‚Č°B(x)(modxn) šł§ŤĺĻŚźĆśó∂śĪāŚĮľÔľĆŚĺóÔľö ln‚Ā°‚Ä≤(A(x))A‚Ä≤(x)‚Č°B‚Ä≤(x)(modxn)\\ln'(A(x))A'(x)\\equiv B'(x)\\pmod{x^n} ln‚Ä≤(A(x))A‚Ä≤(x)‚Č°B‚Ä≤(x)(modxn) ś≥®śĄŹŚąį ln‚Ā°‚Ä≤(x)=1x\\ln'(x)=\\dfrac{1}{x}ln‚Ä≤(x)=x1‚ÄčÔľĆśČÄšĽ•Ôľö A‚Ä≤(x)A(x)‚Č°B‚Ä≤(x)(modxn)\\dfrac{A'(x)}{A(x)}\\equiv B'(x)\\pmod{x^n} A(x)A‚Ä≤(x)‚Äč‚Č°B‚Ä≤(x)(modxn) ŚÜćÁßĮŚąÜŚõěśĚ•Ôľö B(x)‚Č°‚ąęA‚Ä≤(x)A(x)dx(modxn)B(x)\\equiv \\int \\dfrac{A'(x)}{A(x)}dx\\pmod{x^n} B(x)‚Č°‚ąęA(x)A‚Ä≤(x)‚Äčdx(modxn) śČÄšĽ•šłÄšł™śĪāŚĮľÔľĆšłÄšł™ťÄÜŚÖÉÔľĆšłÄšł™šĻėś≥ēÔľĆšłÄšł™ÁßĮŚąÜŚć≥ŚŹĮ„Äā ś≥®śĄŹÁĒĪšļé [x0]A(x)=1[x^0]A(x)=1[x0]A(x)=1ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śúČ [x0]B(x)=0[x^0]B(x)=0[x0]B(x)=0„ÄāŚĻ∂šłĒŤč• [x0]A(x)ÓÄ†=1[x^0]A(x)\\not=1[x0]A(x)ÓÄ†‚Äč=1 Śąôśó†ś≥ēśĪā ln‚Ā°\\lnln Śõ†šłļśĪāšłćŚáļś®°śĄŹšĻČšłčÁöĄ ln‚Ā°([x0]A(x))\\ln([x^0]A(x))ln([x0]A(x))„Äā śó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶ O(nlog‚Ā°n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹ exp‚Ā°\\expexp P4726 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹśĆáśēįŚáĹśēįÔľąŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹ expÔľČ B(x)‚Č°exp‚Ā°(A(x))(modxn)B(x)\\equiv \\exp(A(x))\\pmod{x^n} B(x)‚Č°exp(A(x))(modxn) śąĎšĽ¨Ťģĺ G(F(x))=ln‚Ā°(F(x))‚ąíA(x)G(F(x))=\\ln(F(x))-A(x)G(F(x))=ln(F(x))‚ąíA(x)ÔľĆťā£šĻąśėĺÁĄ∂ G(B(x))‚Č°0(modxn)G(B(x))\\equiv0\\pmod{x^n}G(B(x))‚Č°0(modxn)ÔľĆŚŹĮšĽ•šĹŅÁĒ®ÁČõť°ŅŤŅ≠šĽ£šļÜ„Äā ŚõěŚŅÜÁČõŤŅ≠ŚľŹŚ≠źÔľöF(x)‚Č°F‚ąó(x)‚ąíG(F‚ąó(x))G‚Ä≤(F‚ąó(x))(modxn)F(x)\\equiv F_*(x)-\\dfrac{G(F_*(x))}{G'(F_*(x))}\\pmod{x^n}F(x)‚Č°F‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíG‚Ä≤(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))G(F‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚Äč(modxn) śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆŤŅôťáĆÁöĄ G‚Ä≤(F(x))=1F(X)G'(F(x))=\\dfrac{1}{F(X)}G‚Ä≤(F(x))=F(X)1‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąŚĀáŤģĺśąĎšĽ¨Ś∑≤ÁĽŹśĪāŚáļšļÜ B‚ąó(x)‚Č°exp‚Ā°(A(x))(modxn2)B_*(x)\\equiv \\exp(A(x))\\pmod{x^{\\frac{n}{2}}}B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚Č°exp(A(x))(modx2n‚Äč)ÔľĆśúČÔľö B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)‚ąíG(B‚ąó(x))B‚ąó(x)(modxn)B(x)‚Č°B‚ąó(x)‚ąí(ln‚Ā°(B‚ąó(x))‚ąíA(x))B‚ąó(x)(modxn)B(x)‚Č°(1‚ąíln‚Ā°(B‚ąó(x))+A(x))B‚ąó(x)(modxn)\\begin{aligned} B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-G(B_*(x))B_*(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-(\\ln(B_*(x))-A(x))B_*(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv (1-\\ln(B_*(x))+A(x))B_*(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} B(x)B(x)B(x)‚Äč‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąíG(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚Č°B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚ąí(ln(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))‚ąíA(x))B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚Č°(1‚ąíln(B‚ąó‚Äč(x))+A(x))B‚ąó‚Äč(x)‚Äč(modxn)(modxn)(modxn)‚Äč śČÄšĽ•ŚÄćŚĘěśĪāŚć≥ŚŹĮ„Äā ś≥®śĄŹÁĒĪšļé [x0]A(x)=0[x^0]A(x)=0[x0]A(x)=0ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śúČ [x0]B(x)=1[x^0]B(x)=1[x0]B(x)=1„ÄāŚĻ∂šłĒŤč• [x0]A(x)ÓÄ†=0[x^0]A(x)\\not=0[x0]A(x)ÓÄ†‚Äč=0 Śąôśó†ś≥ēśĪā exp‚Ā°\\expexp Śõ†šłļśĪāšłćŚáļś®°śĄŹšĻČšłčÁöĄ exp‚Ā°([x0]A(x))\\exp([x^0]A(x))exp([x0]A(x))„Äā śó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶šłļ T(n)=T(n2)+O(nlog‚Ā°n)=O(nlog‚Ā°n)T(n)=T(\\frac{n}{2})+O(n\\log n)=O(n\\log n)T(n)=T(2n‚Äč)+O(nlogn)=O(nlogn)„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹŚŅęťÄüŚĻā P5245 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚŅęťÄüŚĻā ŤßāŚĮüŚąį (A(x))k=exp‚Ā°(kln‚Ā°(A(x)))(A(x))^k=\\exp(k\\ln(A(x)))(A(x))k=exp(kln(A(x)))ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•šłÄšł™ ln‚Ā°\\lnlnÔľĆšłÄšł™ťÄźť°ĻšĻėś≥ēÔľĆšłÄšł™ exp‚Ā°\\expexp ŚįĪŚĀöŚģĆšļÜ„Äā P5273 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚĻāŚáĹśēįÔľąŚä†ŚľļÁČąÔľČ ŤŅôťĘėŚíĆšłäšłÄťĘėÁöĄŚĆļŚąęŚú®šļéśúČ A0ÓÄ†=1A_0\\not=1A0‚ÄčÓÄ†‚Äč=1 ÁöĄśÉÖŚÜĶÔľĆŤŅôśó∂śąĎšĽ¨ŚįĪś≤°Śäěś≥ēśĪā ln‚Ā°\\lnln ŚíĆ exp‚Ā°\\expexp šļÜ„Äā šĹÜśėĮ A0ÓÄ†=1A_0\\not=1A0‚ÄčÓÄ†‚Äč=1 ś≤°ŚÖ≥Á≥ĽÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•Ťģ©śČÄśúČť°ĻťÉĹšĻėšłä 1A0\\dfrac{1}{A_0}A0‚Äč1‚ÄčÔľĆśúÄŚźéŚÜćťÉĹšĻėšłä A0kA_0^kA0k‚Äč Ść≥ŚŹĮ„Äā ťĀáŚąį A0=0A_0=0A0‚Äč=0 ÁöĄśÉÖŚÜĶšĻüś≤°ŚÖ≥Á≥ĽÔľĆśääÁ≥ĽśēįŚĺÄŚČćÁßĽÔľĆśĪāŚáļÁ≠Ēś°ąŚźéŚÜćÁßĽŚõěŚéĽŚć≥ŚŹĮ„ÄāšłćŤŅáŤ¶Āś≥®śĄŹŚéüśĚ•ŚČćťĚĘ cntcntcnt šł™ 000 Śú®ŚĀöŚĻāŤŅźÁģóŚźéšľöŚŹėśąź cnt√ókcnt\\times kcnt√ók šł™ 000„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹŚł¶šĹôťô§ś≥ē P4512 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹťô§ś≥ē ŚŹĎÁéįšĹôśēįŚĺąÁÉ¶ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨śÉ≥Śäěś≥ēŚéĽśéČŚģÉ„Äā ŤąćŚľÉŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄť°ĻÁöĄśĖĻś≥ēśėĮšłÄŤą¨śėĮŚä†šłäś¨°śēįÁēĆÔľĆšĹÜś≥®śĄŹŚąįś¨°śēįÁēĆŚŹ™ŤÉĹŤąćŚľÉťęėś¨°ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ŤÄÉŤôĎśääŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįŚŹćŤŅáśĚ•śźě„Äā ťā£šĻąŚõěŚąįťĘėÁõģÁöĄŚľŹŚ≠źÔľö F(x)=Q(x)G(x)+R(x)F(x)=Q(x)G(x)+R(x) F(x)=Q(x)G(x)+R(x) ŚÖ∂šł≠ FFF śėĮ nnn ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľąŚ∑≤Áü•ÔľČÔľĆGGG śėĮ mmm ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľąŚ∑≤Áü•ÔľČÔľĆQQQ śėĮ n‚ąímn-mn‚ąím ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľąśú™Áü•ÔľČÔľĆRRR śėĮ m‚ąí1m-1m‚ąí1 ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľąśú™Áü•ÔľČ„Äā śćĘŚÖÉÔľĆśúČÔľö F(1x)=Q(1x)G(1x)+R(1x)F(\\frac{1}{x})=Q(\\frac{1}{x})G(\\frac{1}{x})+R(\\frac{1}{x}) F(x1‚Äč)=Q(x1‚Äč)G(x1‚Äč)+R(x1‚Äč) ŚźĆšĻė xnx^nxnÔľĆśúČ: xnF(1x)=xnQ(1x)G(1x)+xnR(1x)x^nF(\\frac{1}{x})=x^nQ(\\frac{1}{x})G(\\frac{1}{x})+x^nR(\\frac{1}{x}) xnF(x1‚Äč)=xnQ(x1‚Äč)G(x1‚Äč)+xnR(x1‚Äč) ŚŹĎÁéį xnF(1x)=FR(x)x^nF(\\frac{1}{x})=F_R(x)xnF(x1‚Äč)=FR‚Äč(x)ÔľĆxnQ(1x)G(1x)=QR(x)GR(x)x^nQ(\\frac{1}{x})G(\\frac{1}{x})=Q_R(x)G_R(x)xnQ(x1‚Äč)G(x1‚Äč)=QR‚Äč(x)GR‚Äč(x)ÔľĆxnR(1x)=xn‚ąím+1RR(x)x^nR(\\frac{1}{x})=x^{n-m+1}R_R(x)xnR(x1‚Äč)=xn‚ąím+1RR‚Äč(x)ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śúČÔľö FR(x)=QR(x)GR(x)+xn‚ąím+1RR(x)F_R(x)=Q_R(x)G_R(x)+x^{n-m+1}R_R(x) FR‚Äč(x)=QR‚Äč(x)GR‚Äč(x)+xn‚ąím+1RR‚Äč(x) ťā£šĻąśąĎšĽ¨śúļśôļŚúįŚä†šłäś¨°śēįÁēĆÔľĆmod‚Ā°\\operatorname{mod}mod šłä xn‚ąím+1x^{n-m+1}xn‚ąím+1ÔľĆŚįĪśúČÔľö FR(x)‚Č°QR(x)GR(x)(modxn‚ąím+1)F_R(x)\\equiv Q_R(x)G_R(x)\\pmod{x^{n-m+1}} FR‚Äč(x)‚Č°QR‚Äč(x)GR‚Äč(x)(modxn‚ąím+1) ťā£šĻąŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•śĪāŚáļ QR(x)Q_R(x)QR‚Äč(x) šļÜÔľĆÁ≥ĽśēįŚŹćŤŅáśĚ•ŚįĪśėĮ Q(x)Q(x)Q(x)ÔľĆÁĄ∂ŚźéŚć≥ŚŹĮÁĒ®šĻėś≥ēŚíĆŚáŹś≥ēśĪāŚáļ R(x)R(x)R(x)ÔľĆśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶ O(nlog‚Ā°n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)„Äā ŚģĆśēīś®°śĚŅ ŚĆÖśč¨Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹŚ§öÁāĻśĪāŚÄľ„ÄĀŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹŚŅęťÄüśŹíŚÄľ„Äā ŚĪēŚľÄ const int p=998244353,ginv=332748118; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } inline int gcd(int a,int b) { int t=a%b; while(t!=0) a=b,b=t,t=a%b; return b; } inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1) res=((y&1)?1ll*res*x%p:res),x=1ll*x*x%p; return res; } inline int exBSGS(int a,int b,int p) { a%=p,b%=p; if(b==1||p==1) return 0; int cnt=0,val=1; while(1) { int d=gcd(a,p); if(d==1) break; if(b%d!=0) return -1; p/=d; b/=d; val=1ll*val*(a/d)%p; cnt++; if(val==b) return cnt; } map<int,int> mp; int val2=1,t=sqrt(p)+1; for(int B=1;B<=t;B++) { val2=1ll*val2*a%p; mp[1ll*b*val2%p]=B; } int cur=val; for(int A=1;A<=t;A++) { cur=1ll*cur*val2%p; if(mp.find(cur)!=mp.end()) return A*t-mp[cur]+cnt; } return -1; } inline int mosqrt(int x) { int bse=exBSGS(3,x,p); if(bse==-1||(bse&1)) return -1; return qpow(3,bse/2); } namespace PLOY { const int MS=5000005; typedef vector<int> ploy; inline ploy operator+(ploy a,ploy b); inline ploy operator+(ploy a,int b); inline ploy operator+(int a,ploy b); inline ploy operator-(ploy a,ploy b); inline ploy operator-(ploy a,int b); inline ploy operator-(int a,ploy b); inline ploy operator*(int b,ploy a); inline ploy operator*(ploy a,int b); inline ploy operator*(int b,ploy a); inline ploy inv(ploy a); inline ploy dao(ploy a); inline ploy jif(ploy a); inline ploy ln(ploy a); inline ploy exp(ploy a); inline ploy pow(ploy a,int b); inline ploy pow2(ploy a,int b,int b2); // b%p b2%(p-1) inline void divi(ploy a,ploy b,ploy &res,ploy &r); inline ploy operator%(ploy a,ploy b); inline vector<int> getval(ploy a,vector<int> x); inline ploy getploy(vector<int> x,vector<int> y); int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; int p_tmpinv[MS]; inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } inline void NTT(ploy &a,int tpe) { int n=a.size(); if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); int g=tpe==1?3:ginv; for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1,Wn=qpow(g,(p-1)/len); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { for(int k=0,Wk=1;k<mid;k++,Wk=1ll*Wk*Wn%p) { int x=a[l+k],y=1ll*Wk*a[l+mid+k]%p; a[l+k]=(x+y)%p,a[l+mid+k]=(x-y+p)%p; } } } } inline void DFT(ploy &a){NTT(a,1);} inline void IDFT(ploy &a) { int n=a.size(); NTT(a,-1); int inv=qpow(n,p-2); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*inv%p; } inline ploy operator+(ploy a,ploy b) { if(a.size()<b.size()) swap(a,b); for(int i=0;i<b.size();i++) add(a[i],b[i]); return a; } inline ploy operator+(ploy a,int b){return add(a[0],b),a;} inline ploy operator+(int a,ploy b){return add(b[0],a),b;} inline ploy operator-(ploy a,ploy b) { if(a.size()<b.size()) a.resize(b.size(),0); for(int i=0;i<b.size();i++) add(a[i],p-b[i]); return a; } inline ploy operator-(ploy a,int b){return add(a[0],p-b),a;} inline ploy operator-(int a,ploy b) { add(b[0],p-a); for(int i=0;i<b.size();i++) b[i]=p-b[i]; return b; } inline ploy operator*(ploy a,int b) { for(int i=0;i<a.size();i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b%p; return a; } inline ploy operator*(int b,ploy a) { for(int i=0;i<a.size();i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b%p; return a; } inline ploy operator*(ploy a,ploy b) { int n=a.size()+b.size()-1,m=getlen(n); a.resize(m,0),b.resize(m,0); DFT(a),DFT(b); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b[i]%p; IDFT(a); a.resize(n,0); return a; } inline ploy inv(ploy a) { int n=a.size(),m=getlen(n); ploy res={qpow(a[0],p-2)}; for(int len=2;len<=m;len<<=1) { ploy tmp=a; tmp.resize(len,0); res=res*2-res*res*tmp; res.resize(len,0); } res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy sqrt(ploy a) { ploy res={mosqrt(a[0])}; if(res[0]==-1) return ploy(); int n=a.size(),m=getlen(n)*2; // šłćÁü•ťĀďšłļšĽÄšĻąŤ¶ĀšĻėšļĆ for(int len=2;len<=m;len<<=1) { ploy tmp=a; tmp.resize(len,0); res=(res*res+tmp)*inv(res*2); res.resize(len,0); } res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy dao(ploy a) { int n=a.size();ploy res=a; res[n-1]=0;for(int i=1;i<n;i++) res[i-1]=1ll*a[i]*i%p; return res; } inline ploy jif(ploy a) { int n=a.size();ploy res=a; for(int i=1;i<n;i++) if(p_tmpinv[i]==0) p_tmpinv[i]=(i==1?1:1ll*p_tmpinv[p%i]*(p-p/i)%p); res[0]=0;for(int i=1;i<n;i++) res[i]=1ll*a[i-1]*p_tmpinv[i]%p; return res; } inline ploy ln(ploy a) { int n=a.size(); ploy res=jif(dao(a)*inv(a)); res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy exp(ploy a) { int n=a.size(),m=getlen(n)*2; ploy res={1}; for(int len=2;len<=m;len<<=1) { ploy tmp=a; tmp.resize(len,0); res=(1-ln(res)+tmp)*res; res.resize(len,0); } res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy pow(ploy a,int b) { ploy tmp=ln(a); for(int i=0;i<a.size();i++) tmp[i]=1ll*tmp[i]*b%p; return exp(tmp); } inline ploy pow2(ploy a,int b,int b2) { int n=a.size(),cnt=0; for(int i=0;i<n&&a[i]==0;i++) cnt++; if(1ll*cnt*b2>=n) return ploy(n,0); int pos=cnt*b2,m=n-pos; ploy tmp; for(int i=cnt;i<cnt+m;i++) tmp.push_back(a[i]); int inv=qpow(tmp[0],p-2),ml=qpow(tmp[0],b2); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) tmp[i]=1ll*tmp[i]*inv%p; tmp=pow(tmp,b); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) tmp[i]=1ll*tmp[i]*ml%p; ploy res(pos,0); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) res.push_back(tmp[i]); return res; } inline void divi(ploy a,ploy b,ploy &res,ploy &r) { int n=a.size(),m=b.size(); if(n<m) return res={0},r=a,void(); int rl=n-m+1; ploy ta=a,tb=b; reverse(ta.begin(),ta.end()),reverse(tb.begin(),tb.end()); ta.resize(rl,0),tb.resize(rl,0); res=ta*inv(tb); res.resize(rl,0); reverse(res.begin(),res.end()); r=a-b*res; r.resize(m-1,0); } inline ploy operator%(ploy a,ploy b) { ploy res,r; divi(a,b,res,r); return r; } inline vector<int> getval(ploy a,vector<int> x) { int n=x.size(); vector<ploy> ml(n<<2|1),res(n<<2|1); vector<pair<pair<int,int>,pair<int,int> > > sta; vector<int> ans(n); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,stp=t.first.second,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { ml[u]={p-x[l],1}; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(stp==0) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); } else if(stp==1) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } else ml[u]=ml[u<<1]*ml[u<<1|1]; } res[1]=a%ml[1]; sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { ans[l]=res[u][0]; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; res[u<<1]=res[u]%ml[u<<1]; res[u<<1|1]=res[u]%ml[u<<1|1]; sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } return ans; } inline ploy getploy(vector<int> x,vector<int> y) { int n=x.size(); vector<ploy> ml(n<<2|1),res(n<<2|1); vector<pair<pair<int,int>,pair<int,int> > > sta; vector<int> ans(n); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,stp=t.first.second,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { ml[u]={p-x[l],1}; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(stp==0) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); } else if(stp==1) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } else ml[u]=ml[u<<1]*ml[u<<1|1]; } ploy M=dao(ml[1]); vector<int> val=getval(M,x); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) val[i]=1ll*qpow(val[i],p-2)*y[i]%p; sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,stp=t.first.second,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { res[u]={val[l]}; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(stp==0) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); } else if(stp==1) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } else res[u]=res[u<<1]*ml[u<<1|1]+ml[u<<1]*res[u<<1|1]; } return res[1]; } } śõīŚŅęÁöĄśĚŅŚ≠ź ŚĪēŚľÄ #include <bits/stdc++.h> using ull = unsigned long long; const int N = 280000; const int Mod = 998244353; typedef std::vector<int> Poly; namespace Pol { int pow(int a, int b, int ans = 1); int add(int a, int b) { return (a += b) >= Mod ? a -= Mod : a; } int sub(int a, int b) { return (a -= b) < 0 ? a += Mod : a; } void inc(int &a, int b) { (a += b) >= Mod ? a -= Mod : a; } void dec(int &a, int b) { (a -= b) < 0 ? a += Mod : a; } void init_Poly(int n = N); void DIT(int *A, int lim); void DIF(int *A, int lim); Poly inv(Poly A, int n); Poly mult(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m); Poly operator*(const Poly &A, const Poly &B) { return mult(A, A.size(), B, B.size()); } Poly Tmul(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m); Poly getv(Poly A, int n, const std::vector<int> &f, int m); Poly drv(const Poly &A, int n); Poly itg(const Poly &A, int n); Poly ln(const Poly &A, int n); Poly exp(Poly A, int n); int fac[N], ifac[N], iv[N]; Poly G[N << 1]; ull tmp[N]; int gw[N]; } // namespace Pol int main() { Pol::init_Poly(); int n, m; scanf("%d %d", &n, &m); Poly F(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) scanf("%d", &F[i]); Poly G = Pol::ln(Pol::inv(Pol::exp(F, n), n), n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) printf("%d%c", G[i], " \\n"[i == n - 1]); std::vector<int> f(m); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) scanf("%d", &f[i]); G = Pol::getv(F, n, f, m); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) printf("%d%c", G[i], " \\n"[i == m - 1]); return 0; } namespace Pol { void DIT(int *A, int lim) { for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tmp[i] = A[i]; for (int l = 1; l < lim; l <<= 1) { ull *k = tmp; for (int *g = gw; k < tmp + lim; k += (l << 1), ++g) { for (ull *x = k; x < k + l; ++x) { int o = x[l] % Mod; x[l] = 1ll * (*x + Mod - o) **g % Mod, *x += o; } } } int iv = pow(lim, Mod - 2); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) A[i] = 1ll * tmp[i] % Mod * iv % Mod; std::reverse(A + 1, A + lim); } void DIF(int *A, int lim) { for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tmp[i] = A[i]; for (int l = lim / 2; l >= 1; l >>= 1) { ull *k = tmp; for (int *g = gw; k < tmp + lim; k += (l << 1), ++g) { for (ull *x = k; x < k + l; ++x) { int o = 1ll * x[l] **g % Mod; x[l] = *x + Mod - o, *x += o; } } } for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) A[i] = tmp[i] % Mod; } Poly mult(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m) { if (n + m < 255) { Poly ans(n + m - 1); std::fill(tmp, tmp + n + m, 0); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) for (int j = 0; j < m; ++j) tmp[i + j] += 1ll * A[i] * B[j] % Mod; for (int i = 0; i < n + m - 1; ++i) ans[i] = tmp[i] % Mod; return ans; } int lim = 1; while (lim < (n + m - 1)) lim <<= 1; static int tA[N], tB[N]; std::copy_n(A.begin(), n, tA), std::fill(tA + n, tA + lim, 0); std::copy_n(B.begin(), m, tB), std::fill(tB + m, tB + lim, 0); DIF(tA, lim), DIF(tB, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tA[i] = 1ll * tA[i] * tB[i] % Mod; DIT(tA, lim); Poly ans(n + m - 1); std::copy_n(tA, n + m - 1, ans.begin()); return ans; } Poly Tmul(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m) { if (n + m < 255) { Poly ans(m - n + 1); std::fill(tmp, tmp + m - n + 2, 0); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) for (int j = i; j < n; ++j) tmp[j - i] += 1ll * B[i] * A[j] % Mod; for (int i = 0; i < m - n + 1; ++i) ans[i] = tmp[i] % Mod; } int lim = 1; while (lim < m) lim <<= 1; static int tA[N], tB[N]; std::reverse_copy(A.begin(), A.begin() + n, tA), std::fill(tA + n, tA + lim, 0); std::copy_n(B.begin(), m, tB), std::fill(tB + m, tB + lim, 0); DIF(tA, lim), DIF(tB, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tA[i] = 1ll * tA[i] * tB[i] % Mod; DIT(tA, lim); Poly ans(m - n + 1); std::copy_n(tA + n - 1, m - n + 1, ans.begin()); return ans; } Poly inv(Poly A, int n) { int lim = 1; while (lim < (n << 1)) lim <<= 1; Poly F(lim), G(lim); A.resize(lim); G[0] = pow(A[0], Mod - 2); int now = 1; static int tA[N], tB[N]; while (now < n) { std::copy_n(A.begin(), now << 1, F.begin()); int lim = now << 2; std::copy_n(G.begin(), lim, tA); std::copy_n(F.begin(), lim, tB); DIF(tA, lim), DIF(tB, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tA[i] = 1ll * sub(2, 1ll * tA[i] * tB[i] % Mod) * tA[i] % Mod; DIT(tA, lim); std::copy_n(tA, now << 1, G.begin()); now <<= 1; } G.resize(n); return G; } Poly drv(const Poly &A, int n) { Poly ans(n - 1); for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) ans[i] = 1ll * A[i + 1] * (i + 1) % Mod; return ans; } Poly itg(const Poly &A, int n) { Poly ans(n + 1); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) ans[i + 1] = 1ll * A[i] * iv[i + 1] % Mod; return ans; } Poly ln(const Poly &A, int n) { Poly F = drv(A, n), G = inv(A, n); F = mult(F, n - 1, G, n); F.resize(n - 1); F = itg(F, n - 1); return F; } Poly exp(Poly A, int n) { int lim = 1; while (lim < (n << 1)) lim <<= 1; A.resize(lim); Poly L(lim); int now = 1; static int tF[N], tG[N], tL[N]; std::fill(tG, tG + lim, 0), std::fill(tF, tF + lim, 0); tG[0] = 1; while (now < n) { int lim = now << 2; std::copy_n(tG, now, L.begin()); L = ln(L, std::min(now << 1, n)); L.resize(lim); std::copy_n(A.begin(), now << 1, tF); std::copy_n(L.begin(), lim, tL); DIF(tF, lim), DIF(tG, lim), DIF(tL, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tG[i] = 1ll * tG[i] * sub(add(1, tF[i]), tL[i]) % Mod; DIT(tG, lim); std::fill(tG + (now << 1), tG + lim, 0); now <<= 1; } Poly G(n); std::copy_n(tG, n, G.begin()); return G; } void getg(int x, int xl, int xr, const Poly &f, int m) { if (xl == xr) { G[x].resize(2); G[x][0] = 1; if (xl >= m) G[x][1] = 0; else G[x][1] = Mod - f[xl]; return; } int xm = (xl + xr) >> 1; getg(x << 1, xl, xm, f, m), getg(x << 1 | 1, xm + 1, xr, f, m); G[x] = mult(G[x << 1], xm - xl + 2, G[x << 1 | 1], xr - xm + 1); } void getans(int x, int xl, int xr, Poly &ans, int m, const Poly &h) { if (xl >= m) return; if (xl == xr) return void(ans[xl] = h[0]); int xm = (xl + xr) >> 1; Poly hl = Tmul(G[x << 1 | 1], xr - xm + 1, h, xr - xl + 1); getans(x << 1, xl, xm, ans, m, hl); Poly hr = Tmul(G[x << 1], xm - xl + 2, h, xr - xl + 1); getans(x << 1 | 1, xm + 1, xr, ans, m, hr); } Poly getv(Poly A, int n, const std::vector<int> &f, int m) { n = std::max(n, m); A.resize(n); getg(1, 0, n - 1, f, m); Poly now = inv(G[1], n); std::reverse(now.begin(), now.begin() + n); Poly h = mult(now, n, A, n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) h[i] = h[i + n - 1]; h.resize(n); Poly ans(m); getans(1, 0, n - 1, ans, m, h); return ans; } void init_Poly(int n) { int t = 1; while ((1 << t) < n) ++t; t = std::min(t - 1, 21); gw[0] = 1, gw[1 << t] = pow(31, 1 << (21 - t)); for (int i = t; i; --i) gw[1 << (i - 1)] = 1ll * gw[1 << i] * gw[1 << i] % Mod; for (int i = 1; i < (1 << t); ++i) gw[i] = 1ll * gw[i & (i - 1)] * gw[i & -i] % Mod; --n; fac[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) fac[i] = 1ll * fac[i - 1] * i % Mod; ifac[n] = Pol::pow(fac[n], Mod - 2); for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) ifac[i] = 1ll * ifac[i + 1] * (i + 1) % Mod; for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) iv[i] = 1ll * ifac[i] * fac[i - 1] % Mod; } int pow(int a, int b, int ans) { while (b) { if (b & 1) ans = 1ll * ans * a % Mod; a = 1ll * a * a % Mod; b >>= 1; } return ans; } } // namespace Pol min read","time":2407000,"words":7004,"minutes":41},"date":"2023-03-23 16:32:09","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"BSGS śėĮšłÄšł™ÁĒ®śĚ•śĪāťęėś¨°ŚźĆšĹôśĖĻÁ®čÁöĄśöīŚäõÁģóś≥ē„Äā ŚÖąÁúčšłÄťĀďšĺčťĘė: ÁĽôŚģö a,b,pa,b,pa,b,pÔľĆšŅĚŤĮĀ a,b,p‚Č•2a,b,p\\ge2a,b,p‚Č•2 šłĒ gcd‚Ā°(a,p)=1\\operatorname{gcd}(a,p)=1gcd(a,p)=1ÔľĆśĪā ax‚Č°b(modp)a^x\\equiv b\\pmod pax‚Č°b(modp) ÁöĄśúÄŚįŹŤá™ÁĄ∂śēįŤß£ xxx„Äā śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•śöīŚäõšĽéŚįŹŚąįŚ§ßśěöšłĺ xxxÔľĆŚą§śĖ≠śĮŹšł™ xxx śėĮŚź¶Śźąś≥ē„Äāś†Ļśćģś¨ßśčČÁöĄÁ•ěŚ•áŚģöÁźÜÔľĆaŌÜ(p)‚Č°1(modp)a^{\\varphi(p)}\\equiv 1\\pmod paŌÜ(p)‚Č°1(modp)ÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™ťúÄŤ¶ĀśěöšłĺŚąį ŌÜ(p)\\varphi(p)ŌÜ(p) Ść≥ŚŹĮ„Äāśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶ O(p)O(p)O(p)„Äā ŤŅôś†∑śėĺÁĄ∂šłćŚ§üŚ•ĹÔľĆŚĺąŚ§öśó∂ŚÄô ppp ťÉĹŚćĀŚąÜŚ∑®Ś§ß„ÄāŤÄÉŤôĎšľėŚĆĖÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•śää xxx śčÜŚľÄÔľĆśčÜśąź x=tA‚ąíBx=tA-Bx=tA‚ąíBÔľĆŚÖ∂šł≠ B‚Č§tB\\le tB‚Č§t„Äāťā£šĻąśúČÔľö atA‚ąíB‚Č°b(modp)a^{tA-B}\\equiv b\\pmod p atA‚ąíB‚Č°b(modp) atA‚Č°baB(modp)a^{tA}\\equiv ba^B\\pmod p atA‚Č°baB(modp) ŤŅôś†∑śąĎšĽ¨ŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•ÁĒ®šłÄšł™ŚďąŚłĆŤ°®Ś≠ėśĮŹšł™ baBmod‚Ā°pba^B\\operatorname{mod} pbaBmodp ŚĮĻŚļĒÁöĄśúÄŚ§ßÁöĄ BBBÔľĆÁĄ∂Śźéśěöšłĺ AAAÔľĆŚŅęťÄüśČĺŚąį atAa^{tA}atA ŚĮĻŚļĒÁöĄ BBBÔľĆÁ≠Ēś°ąŚć≥šłļ x=tA‚ąíBx=tA-Bx=tA‚ąíB„Äā śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆś≠§śó∂ ttt ŚŹĖ ‚Ćąp‚ĆČ\\left\\lceil\\sqrt p\\right\\rceil‚Ćąp‚Äč‚ĆČ śėĮśúÄšľėÁöĄ„Äāś≠§śó∂śó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶šłļ O(‚Ćąp‚ĆČ)O(\\left\\lceil\\sqrt p\\right\\rceil)O(‚Ćąp‚Äč‚ĆČ)„ÄāŚ¶āśěúÁĒ® map śĚ•ŚďąŚłĆÁöĄŤĮĚśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶šľöŚ§öŚŹ™ log‚Ā°\\loglog„Äā šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cmath> #include <map> using namespace std; inline int BSGS(int a,int b,int p) { map<int,int> mp; int val=1,t=sqrt(p)+1; for(int B=1;B<=t;B++) { val=1ll*val*a%p; mp[1ll*b*val%p]=B; } int cur=val; for(int A=1;A<=t;A++) { if(mp.find(val)!=mp.end()) { return A*t-mp[val]; } val=1ll*val*cur%p; } return -1; } int main() { int p,a,b; scanf("%d%d%d",&p,&a,&b); int x=BSGS(a,b,p); if(x==-1) { puts("no solution"); return 0; } printf("%d\\n",x); return 0; } šĹÜśėĮśúČšļõśó∂ŚÄôÔľĆgcd‚Ā°(a,p)ÓÄ†=1\\gcd(a,p)\\not=1gcd(a,p)ÓÄ†‚Äč=1ÔľĆÁĒ®šłćšļÜ BSGS„ÄāŤŅôśó∂ŚÄôśąĎšĽ¨ŚįĪťúÄŤ¶Ā exBSGS šļÜ„Äā šĺčŚ¶āŤŅôťĀďťĘėÔľöP4195 „Äźś®°śĚŅ„ÄĎśČ©ŚĪē BSGS/exBSGS ŚĹď gcd‚Ā°(a,p)ÓÄ†=1\\gcd(a,p)\\not=1gcd(a,p)ÓÄ†‚Äč=1 śó∂ÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨šĽ§ d=gcd‚Ā°(a,p)d=\\gcd(a,p)d=gcd(a,p)ÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö ax‚Č°b(modp)a^x\\equiv b\\pmod p ax‚Č°b(modp) adax‚ąí1‚Č°bd(modpd)\\dfrac{a}{d}a^{x-1}\\equiv \\dfrac{b}{d}\\pmod{\\dfrac{p}{d}} da‚Äčax‚ąí1‚Č°db‚Äč(moddp‚Äč) Ś¶āśěú gcd‚Ā°(ad,pd)\\gcd(\\dfrac{a}{d},\\dfrac{p}{d})gcd(da‚Äč,dp‚Äč) šĽćÁĄ∂šłćšłļ 111ÔľĆťā£šĻąÁĽßÁĽ≠ŚĀöšłčŚéĽÔľĆÁõīŚąį gcd‚Ā°(aD,pD)=1\\gcd(\\dfrac{a}{D},\\dfrac{p}{D})=1gcd(Da‚Äč,Dp‚Äč)=1 šłļś≠ĘÔľąDDD šłļśČÄśúČ ddd ÁöĄšĻėÁßĮÔľČ„Äā ŤŅôśó∂śąĎšĽ¨ÁöĄśĖĻÁ®čŚŹėśąźšļÜŤŅôś†∑Ôľącntcntcnt śėĮśďćšĹúÁöĄś¨°śēįÔľČÔľö acntDax‚ąícnt‚Č°bD(modpD)\\dfrac{a^{cnt}}{D}a^{x-cnt}\\equiv \\dfrac{b}{D}\\pmod{\\dfrac{p}{D}} Dacnt‚Äčax‚ąícnt‚Č°Db‚Äč(modDp‚Äč) ŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•ÁĒ® BSGS Ťģ°ÁģóÁ≠Ēś°ąšļÜ„Äā ś≥®śĄŹÁČĻŚą§ x=0x=0x=0 ŚíĆ x=cntx=cntx=cnt ÁöĄÁČĻśģäśÉÖŚÜĶ„Äā šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <map> #include <cmath> using namespace std; inline int gcd(int a,int b) { int t=a%b; while(t>0) { a=b; b=t; t=a%b; } return b; } inline int exBSGS(int a,int b,int p) { a%=p; b%=p; if(b==1||p==1) { return 0; } int cnt=0,val=1; while(1) { int d=gcd(a,p); if(d==1) { break; } if(b%d!=0) { return -1; } cnt++; p/=d; b/=d; val=1ll*val*(a/d)%p; if(val==b) { return cnt; } } map<int,int> mp; int val2=1,t=sqrt(p)+1; for(int B=1;B<=t;B++) { val2=1ll*val2*a%p; mp[1ll*b*val2%p]=B; } int cur=1ll*val2*val%p; for(int A=1;A<=t;A++) { if(mp.find(cur)!=mp.end()) { return A*t-mp[cur]+cnt; } cur=1ll*cur*val2%p; } return -1; } int main() { int a,b,p; while(1) { scanf("%d%d%d",&a,&p,&b); if(a==0&&b==0&&p==0) { break; } int res=exBSGS(a,b,p); if(res<0) { puts("No Solution"); } else { printf("%d\\n",res); } } return 0; } ÁĽÉšĻ†ťĘėÁõģ SP3105 MOD - Power Modulo Inverted UVA10225 Discrete Logging P2485 [SDOI2011]Ťģ°ÁģóŚô® 16:31:31","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"FFT ŤôĹÁĄ∂Ś•áŚ¶ôÔľĆšĹÜśėĮÁĒĪšļéťúÄŤ¶ĀÁĒ®śĶģÁāĻśēįÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śúČÁ≤ĺŚļ¶ťóģťĘė„ÄāNTT ŚįĪśėĮŚŹĖś®°śó∂ FFT ÁöĄšłÄšł™ŚģĆÁĺéśõŅšĽ£ŚďĀ„Äā FFT śúČÁ≤ĺŚļ¶ťóģťĘėÁöĄŚéüŚõ†śėĺÁĄ∂śėĮś∂ČŚŹäšļÜśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†ĻÔľĆŚģÉŤ¶ĀÁĒ®šłČŤßíŚáĹśēįśĪāÔľĆťā£šĻąśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•ŤÄÉŤôĎśČĺšłÄšł™Śú®ś®°Áī†śēįśó∂ÁöĄ‚Äúśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†Ļ‚ÄĚ„Äā Śéüś†Ļ šľóśČÄŚĎ®Áü•ÔľĆŚú®ś®° ppp śĄŹšĻČšłčŚŹ™śúČ p‚ąí1p-1p‚ąí1 šł™ŤÉĹšĽ£ŚÖ•Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄŚÄľÔľą000 ś≤°ÁĒ®ÔľČÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™Ť¶ĀśČĺŚąįšłÄšł™ŤÉĹ‚ÄúťĀćŚéÜ‚ÄĚŤŅô p‚ąí1p-1p‚ąí1 šł™ŚÄľÁöĄśēįÔľĆŚįĪŤÉĹśěĄśąźšłÄšł™‚ÄúŚćēšĹćŚúÜ‚ÄĚÔľĆšĻüŚįĪŤÉĹśČĺŚąį‚Äúśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†Ļ‚ÄĚšļÜ„Äā ŤŅôšł™ŤÉĹśěĄśąź‚ÄúŚćēšĹćŚúÜ‚ÄĚÁöĄśēįŚįĪŤĘęÁßįšłļŚéüś†Ļ ggg„Äā ŚĹĘŚľŹŚĆĖÁöĄÔľĆggg šłļś®° ppp ÁöĄŚéüś†ĻÔľĆŚĹďšłĒšĽÖŚĹďŚú®ś®° ppp śĄŹšĻČšłč g0ÓÄ†=g1ÓÄ†=g2ÓÄ†=...ÓÄ†=gp‚ąí2g^0\\not=g^1\\not=g^2\\not=...\\not=g^{p-2}g0ÓÄ†‚Äč=g1ÓÄ†‚Äč=g2ÓÄ†‚Äč=...ÓÄ†‚Äč=gp‚ąí2„Äā šĻüŚįĪśėĮŤĮīŚú®ś®°šłĖÁēĆÁöĄŚĻāŤŅźÁģóŤŅôŚľ†ÁļłšłäÔľĆŚéüś†Ļ ggg śėĮšłÄšł™ŚúÜ„Äā ŚģĻśėďŚŹĎÁéį ggg ŚįĪśėĮŚú®ś®° ppp śĄŹšĻČšłčÁöĄ p‚ąí1p-1p‚ąí1 ś¨°śú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†Ļ„Äā ŚŹĮšĽ•ŤĮĀśėéÔľĆŚú®ś®°Áī†śēį ppp ÁöĄśĄŹšĻČšłčÔľĆggg śÄĽśėĮŚ≠ėŚú®ÁöĄ„ÄāśČÄšĽ• NTT ÁöĄś®°śēįŚŅÖť°ĽŤ¶ĀśėĮÁī†śēį„Äā śąĎšĽ¨ŤÄÉŤôĎś®° ppp śĄŹšĻČšłčÁöĄ nnn ś¨°śú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†Ļ ŌČn\\omega_nŌČn‚Äč„ÄāÁĒĪšļé ggg ÁöĄś¨°ŚĻāśěĄśąźšļÜ‚ÄúŚŹĮšĽ•ŤĘęŚąÜšłļ p‚ąí1p-1p‚ąí1 Á≠ČŚąÜÁöĄŚćēšĹćŚúÜ‚ÄĚÔľĆśČÄšĽ• ŌČn=gp‚ąí1n\\omega_n=g^{\\frac{p-1}{n}}ŌČn‚Äč=gnp‚ąí1‚Äč„Äā śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆś®° ppp śĄŹšĻČšłčÁöĄ ŌČn\\omega_nŌČn‚Äč Ś≠ėŚú®ŚĹďšłĒšĽÖŚĹď n‚ą£p‚ąí1n\\mid p-1n‚ą£p‚ąí1„Äā NTT Ś¶āśěú n=2kn=2^kn=2kÔľĆťā£šĻąśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•śää FFT šł≠ÁöĄŤôöśēįśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†ĻťÉĹśõŅśćĘśąźś®°Áī†śēį ppp śĄŹšĻČšłčÁöĄśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†ĻÔľĆśĚ•ŚģěÁéį NTT„Äā šĹÜŚõ†šłļŚŅÖť°ĽśĽ°Ť∂≥ 2k=n‚ą£p‚ąí12^k=n\\mid p-12k=n‚ą£p‚ąí1ÔľĆśČÄšĽ• NTT ŚĮĻś®°śēįśúČÁČĻśģäťôźŚą∂„Äā NTT ŚŹĮÁĒ®ÁöĄś®°śēį ppp ťúÄŤ¶ĀśĽ°Ť∂≥Ôľö ppp śėĮšł™Ťī®śēį p=a‚čÖ2b+1p=a\\cdot2^b+1p=a‚čÖ2b+1 šĺčŚ¶ā 998244353998244353998244353 ŚįĪśėĮŚźąś≥ēÁöĄÔľĆŚõ†šłļ 998244353=7‚čÖ17‚čÖ223+1998244353=7\\cdot17\\cdot2^{23}+1998244353=7‚čÖ17‚čÖ223+1„ÄāŚģÉÁöĄšłÄšł™Śéüś†ĻśėĮ g=3g=3g=3„Äā ŤŅėśúČ 167772161167772161167772161 ŚíĆ 104857601104857601104857601 šĻüśėĮŚźąś≥ēÁöĄÔľĆg=3g=3g=3 ťÉĹśėĮŚģÉšĽ¨ÁöĄŚéüś†Ļ„Äā ś®°śĚŅťĘėšĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const long long MS=5000005; const int p=998244353,ginv=332748118; inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1) res=((y&1)?1ll*res*x%p:res),x=1ll*x*x%p; return res; } inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; inline void NTT(int n,int a[],int tpe) { if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); int g=tpe==1?3:ginv; for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1,Wn=qpow(g,(p-1)/len); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { for(int k=0,Wk=1;k<mid;k++,Wk=1ll*Wk*Wn%p) { int x=a[l+k],y=1ll*Wk*a[l+mid+k]%p; a[l+k]=(x+y)%p,a[l+mid+k]=(x-y+p)%p; } } } } inline void DFT(int n,int a[]){NTT(n,a,1);} inline void IDFT(int n,int a[]) { NTT(n,a,-1); int inv=qpow(n,p-2); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*inv%p; } int n,m,a[MS],b[MS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); } for(int i=0;i<=m;i++) { scanf("%d",&b[i]); } int len=getlen(n+m+1); DFT(len,a); DFT(len,b); for(int i=0;i<len;i++) { a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b[i]%p; } IDFT(len,a); for(int i=0;i<n+m+1;i++) { printf("%d ",a[i]); } printf("\\n"); return 0; } ÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįŚļŹŚąó aaa ÁöĄÁ¨¨ iii ť°ĻÔľĆŚć≥šłļ aia_iai‚Äč„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄŤ°®Á§ļśĖĻś≥ē Á≥ĽśēįŤ°®Á§ļś≥ē śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆŚŹ™Ť¶ĀśąĎšĽ¨ŚĺóÁü•šļÜÁ≥ĽśēįŚļŹŚąóÔľĆŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•ŚĒĮšłÄÁ°ģŚģöšłÄšł™Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹ„Äā ÁāĻŚÄľŤ°®Á§ļś≥ē ŚĮĻšļéšłÄšł™ nnn ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľĆšĽ£ŚÖ• n+1n+1n+1 šł™šļíšłćÁõłŚźĆÁöĄŚÄľ xix_ixi‚ÄčÔľĆŚŹĮšĽ•ŚĺóŚąį n+1n+1n+1 šł™śĽ°Ť∂≥ yi=f(xi)y_i=f(x_i)yi‚Äč=f(xi‚Äč) ÁöĄ yiy_iyi‚Äč„ÄāŤŅôśó∂ÔľĆŚļŹŚąó xxx ŚíĆŚļŹŚąó yyy ŚŹĮšĽ•ŚĒĮšłÄÁ°ģŚģö fff„Äā Śõ†šłļśúČšļÜ n+1n+1n+1 šł™ÁāĻ (xi,yi)(x_i,y_i)(xi‚Äč,yi‚Äč)ÔľĆŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•ťÄöŤŅáśŹíŚÄľśĚ•Á°ģŚģö fff„Äā Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÁöĄŤŅźÁģó Ťģĺ f,gf,gf,g śėĮšł§šł™ nnn ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľĆśúČÔľö (f+g)(x)=‚ąĎi=0n(fi+gi)xi(f+g)(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(f_i+g_i)x^i (f+g)(x)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(fi‚Äč+gi‚Äč)xi (f‚ąóg)(x)=‚ąĎk=02nxk‚ąĎi‚Č§n,j‚Č§n,i+j=kfigj(f*g)(x)=\\sum\\limits_{k=0}^{2n}x^k\\sum\\limits_{i\\le n,j\\le n,i+j=k}f_ig_j (f‚ąóg)(x)=k=0‚ąĎ2n‚Äčxki‚Č§n,j‚Č§n,i+j=k‚ąĎ‚Äčfi‚Äčgj‚Äč ś¨°ŚćēšĹćś†ĻŚÖ∂ŚģěŚįĪśėĮšĽĽśĄŹšłÄšł™ŚįĪśėĮśĽ°Ť∂≥ xn=1x^n=1xn=1 ÁöĄ xxxÔľĆŤŅôšł™šłúŤ•ŅŚú®ŚģěśēįŤĆÉŚõīśėĺÁĄ∂ŚŹ™śúČšłćŚ§öšļéšł§šł™ÔľĆšĹÜśėĮŚú®ŤôöśēįŤĆÉŚõīŚįĪśúČ nnn šł™šļÜ„Äā ŤÄĆ nnn ŌČn0ÓÄ†=ŌČn1ÓÄ†=ŌČn2ÓÄ†=‚čĮÓÄ†=ŌČnn\\omega_n^0\\not=\\omega_n^1\\not=\\omega_n^2\\not=\\dots\\not=\\omega_n^nŌČn0‚ÄčÓÄ†‚Äč=ŌČn1‚ÄčÓÄ†‚Äč=ŌČn2‚ÄčÓÄ†‚Äč=‚čĮÓÄ†‚Äč=ŌČnn‚Äč„Äā śÉ≥Ť¶ĀśěĄťÄ†šłÄšł™ nnn ś¨°śú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†ĻÔľĆśúÄŚ•ĹÁöĄśĖĻś≥ēŚįĪśėĮśääŚ§ćŚĻ≥ťĚĘšłäÁöĄŚćēšĹćŚúÜŚĻ≥ŚąÜśąź nnn šĽĹ„ÄāšĺčŚ¶āŚÖ≠ś¨°śú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†Ļ ŌČ6\\omega_6ŌČ6‚ÄčÔľö śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆnnn ś¨°śú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†Ļ ŌČn=cos‚Ā°(2ŌÄn)+sin‚Ā°(2ŌÄn)i\\omega_n=\\operatorname{cos}(\\dfrac{2\\pi}{n})+\\operatorname{sin}(\\dfrac{2\\pi}{n})iŌČn‚Äč=cos(n2ŌÄ‚Äč)+sin(n2ŌÄ‚Äč)i„Äā śąĎšĽ¨ŤÄÉŤôĎ ŌČn2\\omega_n^2ŌČn2‚Äč śėĮšĽÄšĻą„ÄāŚõ†šłļŤôöśēįÁöĄšĻėś≥ēś≥ēŚąôśėĮś®°ÁõłšĻėÔľĆŤĺźŤßíÁõłŚä†ÔľĆŤÄĆ ŌČn\\omega_nŌČn‚Äč ÁöĄś®°śėĮ 111ÔľĆśČÄšĽ• ŌČn2\\omega_n^2ŌČn2‚Äč ÁõłŚĹďšļé ŌČn\\omega^nŌČn ŤĹ¨šļÜšłÄšłčÔľö śČÄšĽ• ŌČnk=ŌČnkmod n\\omega_n^k=\\omega_n^{k\\mod n}ŌČnk‚Äč=ŌČnkmodn‚ÄčÔľĆÁõłŚĹďšļéŤĹ¨šłÄŚúąŚźéšľöŤĹ¨ŚõěśĚ•„Äāśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†ĻšľöŤĹ¨śėĮšłÄšł™ŚĺąťáćŤ¶ĀÁöĄśÄßŤī®ÔľĀÔľąŤôĹÁĄ∂śöāśó∂ś≤°śúČÁĒ® ÔľČ DFT ŚíĆ IDFT ÁéįŚú®śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•śääŚćēšĹćś†ĻšĽ¨šĽ£ŚÖ•Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹśĪāŚÄľšļÜÔľĆŤŅôŚįĪśėĮ DFT„ÄāŤģĺ fff śėĮšłÄšł™ n‚ąí1n-1n‚ąí1 ś¨°Ś§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö f^k=‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1fi‚čÖŌČnki\\hat f_k=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}f_i\\cdot\\omega_n^{ki} f^‚Äčk‚Äč=i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčfi‚Äč‚čÖŌČnki‚Äč šłčťĚĘŤģ©śąĎšĽ¨ŤĮĀśėé DFT ÁöĄťÄÜŚŹėśćĘ IDFTÔľö fk=1n‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1f^i‚čÖŌČn‚ąíkif_k=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\hat f_i\\cdot\\omega_n^{-ki} fk‚Äč=n1‚Äči=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčf^‚Äči‚Äč‚čÖŌČn‚ąíki‚Äč ŚįÜ DFT ÁöĄśüŅŚ≠źšĽ£ŚÖ•Ôľö fk=1n‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČn‚ąíki‚ąĎj=0n‚ąí1fj‚čÖŌČnijf_k=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{-ki}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\cdot\\omega_n^{ij} fk‚Äč=n1‚Äči=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČn‚ąíki‚Äčj=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčfj‚Äč‚čÖŌČnij‚Äč =1n‚ąĎj=0n‚ąí1fj‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČn‚ąíki‚čÖŌČnij=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{-ki}\\cdot\\omega_n^{ij} =n1‚Äčj=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčfj‚Äči=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČn‚ąíki‚Äč‚čÖŌČnij‚Äč =1n‚ąĎj=0n‚ąí1fj‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČni(j‚ąík)=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)} =n1‚Äčj=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčfj‚Äči=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČni(j‚ąík)‚Äč ŤÄÉŤôĎ ‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČni(j‚ąík)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)}i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČni(j‚ąík)‚Äč ŤŅôťÉ®ŚąÜÔľö Ťč• j=kj=kj=kÔľĆťā£šĻą ‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČni(j‚ąík)=‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČn0=n\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)}=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{0}=ni=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČni(j‚ąík)‚Äč=i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČn0‚Äč=n Ťč• jÓÄ†=kj\\not=kjÓÄ†‚Äč=kÔľĆťā£šĻąŚõ†šłļ 0‚Č§j,k<n0\\le j,k<n0‚Č§j,k<nÔľĆśČÄšĽ• ‚ą£j‚ąík‚ą£<n,ŌČnj‚ąíkÓÄ†=0|j-k|<n,\\omega_n^{j-k}\\not=0‚ą£j‚ąík‚ą£<n,ŌČnj‚ąík‚ÄčÓÄ†‚Äč=0ÔľĆÁĒĪÁ≠ČśĮĒśēįŚąóśĪāŚíĆŚÖ¨ŚľŹŚĺóŚąįÔľö ‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1ŌČni(j‚ąík)=‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1(ŌČnj‚ąík)i\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)}=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}(\\omega_n^{j-k})^i i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚ÄčŌČni(j‚ąík)‚Äč=i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äč(ŌČnj‚ąík‚Äč)i =1‚ąí(ŌČnj‚ąík)n1‚ąíŌČnj‚ąík=\\dfrac{1-(\\omega_n^{j-k})^n}{1-\\omega_n^{j-k}} =1‚ąíŌČnj‚ąík‚Äč1‚ąí(ŌČnj‚ąík‚Äč)n‚Äč =1‚ąí(ŌČnn)j‚ąík1‚ąíŌČnj‚ąík=\\dfrac{1-(\\omega_n^n)^{j-k}}{1-\\omega_n^{j-k}} =1‚ąíŌČnj‚ąík‚Äč1‚ąí(ŌČnn‚Äč)j‚ąík‚Äč =1‚ąí11‚ąíŌČnj‚ąík=\\dfrac{1-1}{1-\\omega_n^{j-k}} =1‚ąíŌČnj‚ąík‚Äč1‚ąí1‚Äč =0=0 =0 śČÄšĽ• fk=1n‚ąĎj=0n‚ąí1fj‚čÖn‚čÖ[j=k]f_k=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\cdot n\\cdot[j=k] fk‚Äč=n1‚Äčj=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčfj‚Äč‚čÖn‚čÖ[j=k] =1n‚čÖn‚čÖfk=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\cdot n\\cdot f_k =n1‚Äč‚čÖn‚čÖfk‚Äč =fk=f_k =fk‚Äč ŚĺóŤĮĀ„Äā ŚŹĮšĽ•ŚŹĎÁéį DFT ŚíĆ IDFT ÁöĄśüŅŚ≠źśÉäšļļŚúįÁõłšľľÔľĆŚŹ™šłćŤŅáśėĮŚ§öšļÜšł™ 1n\\dfrac{1}{n}n1‚Äč ŚíĆśú¨ŚéüŚćēšĹćś†ĻśĆáśēįšłäťĚĘÁöĄŤīüŚŹ∑ŤÄĆŚ∑≤„ÄāśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™ťúÄŤ¶ĀŤß£ŚÜ≥ DFTÔľĆIDFT ŚįĪŤÉĹŤŅéŚąÉŤÄĆŤß£„Äā FFT Ťģĺ fff śėĮšłÄšł™ś¨°śēįšłļ n‚ąí1n-1n‚ąí1 šłĒ nnn śėĮŚĀ∂śēįÁöĄŚ§öť°ĻŚľŹÔľąŚ¶āśěúŚéüśĚ•ÁöĄ nnn śėĮŚ•áśēįťā£šĻąŚŹĮšĽ•Ť°•šłÄť°ĻÁ≥Ľśēįšłļ 000 ÁöĄť°ĻÔľČÔľĆŤģĺ m=n2m=\\dfrac{n}{2}m=2n‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö f(x)=‚ąĎi=0n‚ąí1fixif(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}f_ix^i f(x)=i=0‚ąĎn‚ąí1‚Äčfi‚Äčxi ś†ĻśćģŚ•áŚĀ∂śÄßŚąÜÁĪĽÔľĆśúČÔľö f(x)=‚ąĎi=0m‚ąí1f2ix2i+‚ąĎi=0m‚ąí1f2i+1x2i+1f(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i}x^{2i}+\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i+1}x^{2i+1} f(x)=i=0‚ąĎm‚ąí1‚Äčf2i‚Äčx2i+i=0‚ąĎm‚ąí1‚Äčf2i+1‚Äčx2i+1 =‚ąĎi=0m‚ąí1f2ix2i+x‚ąĎi=0m‚ąí1f2i+1x2i=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i}x^{2i}+x\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i+1}x^{2i} =i=0‚ąĎm‚ąí1‚Äčf2i‚Äčx2i+xi=0‚ąĎm‚ąí1‚Äčf2i+1‚Äčx2i ŚģöšĻČ f0(x)=‚ąĎi=0m‚ąí1f2ixif0(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i}x^{i}f0(x)=i=0‚ąĎm‚ąí1‚Äčf2i‚ÄčxiÔľĆf1(x)=‚ąĎi=0m‚ąí1f2i+1xif1(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i+1}x^{i}f1(x)=i=0‚ąĎm‚ąí1‚Äčf2i+1‚ÄčxiÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö f(x)=f0(x2)+x‚čÖf1(x2)f(x)=f0(x^2)+x \\cdot f1(x^2)f(x)=f0(x2)+x‚čÖf1(x2) Śú®šĽ£ŚÖ•ŚćēšĹćś†ĻšĻčŚČćÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚÖąśĚ•Áúčšł§šł™ŚćēšĹćś†ĻÁöĄśÄßŤī®Ôľö ŌČ2n2k=ŌČnk\\omega_{2n}^{2k}=\\omega_{n}^k ŌČ2n2k‚Äč=ŌČnk‚Äč ŌČ2nn+k=‚ąíŌČ2nk\\omega_{2n}^{n+k}=-\\omega_{2n}^k ŌČ2nn+k‚Äč=‚ąíŌČ2nk‚Äč Á¨¨šłÄśĚ°śÄßŤī®śėĮŚõ†šłļšĽ• ŌČ2n\\omega_{2n}ŌČ2n‚Äč ÁöĄŤĺźŤßíŤĹ¨ 2k2k2k ś¨°ÁõłŚĹďšļéšĽ• ŌČn\\omega_{n}ŌČn‚Äč ÁöĄŤĺźŤßíŤĹ¨ kkk ś¨°„Äā ŤÄĆÁ¨¨šļĆśĚ°śÄßŤī®śėĮŚõ†šłļšĽ• ŌČ2n\\omega_{2n}ŌČ2n‚Äč ÁöĄŤĺźŤßíŤĹ¨ nnn ś¨°ŚįĪŚąįŤĺĺšļÜ ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 ÁöĄšĹćÁĹģ„Äā ŤģįšĹŹŤŅôšł§śĚ°śÄßŤī®ÔľĆšĽ£ŚÖ•ŚćēšĹćś†ĻÔľĆŚĮĻšļéśĽ°Ť∂≥ 0‚Č§k<m0\\le k<m0‚Č§k<m ÁöĄ kkkÔľĆśúČÔľö f(ŌČnk)=f0(ŌČn2k)+ŌČnk‚čÖf1(ŌČn2k)f(\\omega_n^k)=f0(\\omega_n^{2k})+\\omega_n^k\\cdot f1(\\omega_n^{2k}) f(ŌČnk‚Äč)=f0(ŌČn2k‚Äč)+ŌČnk‚Äč‚čÖf1(ŌČn2k‚Äč) =f0(ŌČmk)+ŌČnk‚čÖf1(ŌČmk)=f0(\\omega_m^k)+\\omega_n^k\\cdot f1(\\omega_m^k) =f0(ŌČmk‚Äč)+ŌČnk‚Äč‚čÖf1(ŌČmk‚Äč) f(ŌČnm+k)=f0(ŌČn2(m+k))+ŌČnm+k‚čÖf1(ŌČn2(m+k))f(\\omega_n^{m+k})=f0(\\omega_n^{2(m+k)})+\\omega_n^{m+k}\\cdot f1(\\omega_n^{2(m+k)}) f(ŌČnm+k‚Äč)=f0(ŌČn2(m+k)‚Äč)+ŌČnm+k‚Äč‚čÖf1(ŌČn2(m+k)‚Äč) =f0(ŌČmk)‚ąíŌČnk‚čÖf1(ŌČmk)=f0(\\omega_m^k)-\\omega_n^{k}\\cdot f1(\\omega_m^k) =f0(ŌČmk‚Äč)‚ąíŌČnk‚Äč‚čÖf1(ŌČmk‚Äč) šĽ•šłäšł§šł™śüŅŚ≠źŚćĀŚąÜÁõłšľľÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ŤĘęÁßįšĹúŤĚīŤĚ∂śďćšĹú„Äā ÁĒĪŤĚīŤĚ∂śďćšĹúšłćťöĺŚĺóŚáļÔľĆŚŹ™Ť¶ĀśąĎšĽ¨ÁģóŚáļšļÜ f0(ŌČm0,ŌČm1,ŌČm2,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1)f0(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f0(ŌČm0‚Äč,ŌČm1‚Äč,ŌČm2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1‚Äč) ŚíĆ f1(ŌČm0,ŌČm1,ŌČm2,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1)f1(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f1(ŌČm0‚Äč,ŌČm1‚Äč,ŌČm2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1‚Äč)ÔľĆŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•ŚŅęťÄüŚĺóŚąį f(ŌČn0,ŌČn1,ŌČn2,‚Ä¶,ŌČnn‚ąí1)f(\\omega_n^0,\\omega_n^1,\\omega_n^2,\\dots,\\omega_n^{n-1})f(ŌČn0‚Äč,ŌČn1‚Äč,ŌČn2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,ŌČnn‚ąí1‚Äč)„Äā ŤÄĆ f0(ŌČm0,ŌČm1,ŌČm2,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1)f0(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f0(ŌČm0‚Äč,ŌČm1‚Äč,ŌČm2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1‚Äč) ŚíĆ f1(ŌČm0,ŌČm1,ŌČm2,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1)f1(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f1(ŌČm0‚Äč,ŌČm1‚Äč,ŌČm2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,ŌČmm‚ąí1‚Äč) ŚŹąŚŹĮšĽ•ťÄíŚĹíšłčŚéĽÁģóÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•ŚąÜś≤ĽšłčŚéĽÔľĆÁĒ® O(nlog‚Ā°n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn) ÁöĄśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶ŚģĆśąź DFTÔľĀ šłćŤŅáťúÄŤ¶Āś≥®śĄŹÁöĄśėĮÔľĆnnn ŚŅÖť°ĽśėĮ 222 ÁöĄŚĻāÔľĆŤ¶ĀšłćÁĄ∂śó†ś≥ēŚąÜś≤Ľ„Äā ŚŅęťÄüŤŅõŤ°Ć IDFT šĻüÁõłŚĹďŚ•ĹŚäěÔľĆŚŹ™Ť¶Āśää FFT šł≠ÁĒ®ŚąįÁöĄśČÄśúČ ŌČn\\omega_nŌČn‚Äč śćĘśąź ŌČn‚ąí1\\omega_n^{-1}ŌČn‚ąí1‚Äč ÔľĆśúÄŚźéŚÜćśääśČÄśúČÁāĻŚÄľšĻėšłä 1n\\dfrac{1}{n}n1‚Äč Ść≥ŚŹĮ„Äā šĹÜśėĮŤŅôŤŅėšłćŚ§üŚŅęÔľĆśČÄšĽ•šľöŤĘęŚć°Śłł„ÄāŤßāŚĮüŚąįŚĹĪŚďćśēąÁéáÁöĄśėĮśĆČŚ•áŚĀ∂śÄßŚąÜś≤ĽÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ŚŹĮšĽ•ŤÄÉŤôĎšĽ§ rev‚Ā°(x)\\operatorname{rev}(x)rev(x) Ť°®Á§ļ xxx ÁöĄšļĆŤŅõŚą∂ŚŹćŤŅáśĚ•ÁĽĄśąźÁöĄśēįÔľĆšĽ§ fi‚Ä≤=frev‚Ā°(i)f^\\prime_i=f_{\\operatorname{rev}(i)}fi‚Ä≤‚Äč=frev(i)‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąŚú® f‚Ä≤f^\\primef‚Ä≤ šłäÁöĄŚąÜś≤ĽśďćšĹúŚÖ∂ŚģěŚįĪśėĮÁõłťāĽšł§šł™ŚļŹŚąóÁöĄŚąÜś≤ĽÔľĆŤŅôś†∑ŚŹĮšĽ•Ś§ßŚ§ßŚä†ŚŅę FFT ÁöĄťÄüŚļ¶ÔľĆŚĻ∂šłĒŚŹĮšĽ•śää FFT ŚÜôśąźťĚěťÄíŚĹíÁöĄ„Äā šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľöÔľąś®°śĚŅťĘėÔľČ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cmath> using namespace std; const long long MS=5000005; const double PI=acos(-1); struct plex { double x,y; plex(double a=0,double b=0) {x=a,y=b;} }; plex operator+(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x+b.x,a.y+b.y);} plex operator-(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y);} plex operator*(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x*b.x-a.y*b.y,a.x*b.y+b.x*a.y);} inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; inline void FFT(int n,plex a[],int tpe) { if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1; plex Wn=plex(cos(2*PI/len),tpe*sin(2*PI/len)); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { plex Wk=plex(1,0); for(int k=0;k<mid;k++,Wk=Wk*Wn) { plex x=a[l+k],y=Wk*a[l+mid+k]; a[l+k]=x+y,a[l+mid+k]=x-y; } } } } inline void DFT(int n,plex a[]) {FFT(n,a,1);} inline void IDFT(int n,plex a[]) { FFT(n,a,-1); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i].x/=n,a[i].y/=n; } int n,m; plex a[MS],b[MS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%lf",&a[i].x); } for(int i=0;i<=m;i++) { scanf("%lf",&b[i].x); } int len=getlen(n+m+1); DFT(len,a); DFT(len,b); for(int i=0;i<len;i++) { a[i]=a[i]*b[i]; } IDFT(len,a); for(int i=0;i<n+m+1;i++) { printf("%d ",(int)(a[i].x+0.5)); } printf("\\n"); return 0; } min read","time":850000,"words":2767,"minutes":15},"date":"2023-03-23 16:25:24","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"ŤŅôśėĮšł™Ś§ßŚ∑•Á®čÔľĆšĽ•ŚźéšľöšłćśĖ≠Ť°•ŚÖÖ„Äā śúÄŚ§ßśĶĀ śúÄŚ§ßśĶĀÁöĄŚĽļś®°ÔľĆŚĺÄŚĺÄśėĮśääśĶĀťáŹŚíĆťĘėÁõģŤ¶ĀśĪāÁöĄšłúŤ•ŅÁõīśé•ŚÖ≥ŤĀĒŤĶ∑śĚ•ÔľĆśėĮśúÄÁģÄŚćēÁõīÁôĹÁöĄŚĽļś®°„ÄāśúÄŚ§ßśĶĀÁöĄś®°ŚěčśúČśó∂ŚÄôŚŹĮšĽ•ŤĹ¨ŚĆĖšłļšļĆŚąÜŚõĺśúÄŚ§ßŚĆĻťÖć„Äā śčÜÁāĻś®°Śěč P2472 [SCOI2007] Ťú•Ťúī ÁĹĎÁĽúśĶĀŚõĺšł≠ÁöĄÁāĻŚ¶āśěúśúČśĶĀťáŹťôźŚą∂ÔľĆťā£šĻąŚŹĮšĽ•śääšłÄšł™ÁāĻ uuu śčÜśąźŚÖ•ÁāĻ u1u_1u1‚Äč ŚíĆŚáļÁāĻ u2u_2u2‚ÄčÔľĆu1u_1u1‚Äč ŤīüŤī£śé•śĒ∂śĶĀťáŹÔľĆu2u_2u2‚Äč ŤīüŤī£ŤĺďťÄĀśĶĀťáŹÔľĆu1u1u1 ŚźĎ u2u2u2 ŤŅěšłÄśĚ°śĶĀťáŹšłļÁāĻśĚÉÁöĄŤĺĻŚć≥ŚŹĮ„Äā ŚąÜŚĪāŚõĺś®°Śěč P2754 [CTSC1999]Śģ∂Śõ≠ / śėüťôÖŤĹ¨ÁßĽťóģťĘė ÁĹĎÁĽúśĶĀŚõĺšł≠ÁöĄÁāĻŚ¶āśěúšľö‚ÄúŚä®‚ÄĚÔľĆťā£šĻąšłćŚ¶®śĆČśó∂ťóīŚąÜŚĪāŚĽļŚõĺÔľĆś®°śčüśó∂ťóīśĶĀťÄĚ„Äā ŤŅėśúČšłÄÁĪĽťĘėśĮĒŤĺÉÁČĻśģäÔľĆŤ¶ĀśĪāśúÄŚįŹŚĪāśēį„Äāťā£šĻąŚÖąŚą§śĖ≠śó†Ťß£ÔľĆŚÜćšłćśĖ≠Śä†ŚĪāÁõīŚąįśĽ°Ť∂≥śĚ°šĽ∂Ść≥ŚŹĮ„Äā śúÄŚįŹŤ∑ĮŚĺĄŤ¶ÜÁõĖś®°Śěč P2764 śúÄŚįŹŤ∑ĮŚĺĄŤ¶ÜÁõĖťóģťĘė ś≠£ťöĺŚąôŚŹćÔľĆť¶ĖŚÖąŤÄÉŤôĎŤģ©śČÄśúČÁāĻťÉĹŤá™śąźŤ∑ĮŚĺĄÔľĆÁĄ∂ŚźéŤÄÉŤôĎŚįĹŚŹĮŤÉĹťÄöŤŅáŤĺĻśĚ•‚ÄúŚźąŚĻ∂‚ÄĚŤŅôšļõŤ∑ĮŚĺĄ„Äā Śõ†šłļśĮŹšł™ÁāĻŚŹ™ŤÉĹŚú®šłÄśĚ°Ť∑ĮŚĺĄšłäÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ŤÄÉŤôĎśčÜÁāĻ„ÄāśääśĮŹšł™ÁāĻ uuu [l,mid][l,mid][l,mid] ŚÜÖÔľĆrigrigrig ÁöĄÁ≠Ēś°ąŚú® [mid+1,r][mid+1,r][mid+1,r] ŚÜÖÔľĆŤŅôś†∑śąĎšĽ¨ťÄíŚĹíšłčŚéĽŚįĪŚŹĮšĽ•śĪāŚáļÁ≠Ēś°ąšļÜ„Äā ŤÄÉŤôĎśÄéšĻąŚąÜÁĽĄ„ÄāŚĮĻšļéšŅģśĒĻśďćšĹú iiiÔľĆśėĺÁĄ∂Ťč• xi‚Č§midx_i \\le midxi‚Äč‚Č§mid ťā£šĻąŤŅôšł™śďćšĹúšľöŚĮĻ lftlftlft ŚíĆ rigrigrig ťÄ†śąźŚĹĪŚďćÔľĆšĹÜšłļšļÜšŅĚŤĮĀśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶ÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™ŚįÜŚģÉśĒĺŚÖ• lftlftlft šł≠ÔľõŚź¶ŚąôŚŹ™šľöŚĮĻ rigrigrig ťÄ†śąźŚĹĪŚďćÔľĆśĒĺŚÖ• rigrigrig šł≠„Äā ŤÄĆŚĮĻšļéŤĮĘťóģśďćšĹú iiiÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•Ťģ°ÁģóŚáļśďćšĹúŚļŹŚąóśČßŤ°ĆŚąį iii śó∂ŚŹĮťáćťõÜŚÜÖśĮĒ midmidmid ŚįŹÁöĄśēįÁöĄšł™śēį kkk„ÄāŤč• k‚Č•xik\\ge x_ik‚Č•xi‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąŤĮīśėéŚĹďŚČć midmidmid Ś§ßšļÜśąĖŤÄÖŚĮĻšļÜÔľĆŤŅôšł™ŤĮĘťóģśďćšĹúťúÄŤ¶ĀŚąÜŚąį lftlftlft ťáĆÔľõŚź¶ŚąôŤĮīśėéŚĹďŚČć midmidmid ŚįŹšļÜÔľĆŤŅôšł™ŤĮĘťóģśďćšĹúťúÄŤ¶ĀŚąÜŚąį rigrigrig ťáĆ„Äā šĹÜśėĮś≥®śĄŹÔľĆk<xik<x_ik<xi‚Äč Ść≥ iii ŤĘęŚąÜŚąį rigrigrig śó∂ÔľĆťúÄŤ¶ĀŚįÜ xix_ixi‚Äč ŚáŹŚéĽ kkk„ÄāŚõ†šłļśąĎšĽ¨Śä†ŚÖ•šŅģśĒĻśďćšĹúśó∂śääśČÄśúČŚĮĻšł§šł™śďćšĹúŚļŹŚąóťÉĹśúČŚĹĪŚďćÁöĄśďćšĹúśĒĺŤŅõšļÜ lftlftlft ŤÄĆś≤°śúČŚä†ŚÖ• rigrigrigÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨ťúÄŤ¶ĀťĘĚŚ§ĖŤģ°ÁģóšłäŤŅôšļõšŅģśĒĻÁöĄŤī°ÁĆģ„Äā ŚģĻśėďŚŹĎÁéįÔľĆŤģ°ÁģóśďćšĹúŚļŹŚąóśČßŤ°ĆŚąį iii śó∂ŚŹĮťáćťõÜŚÜÖśĮĒ midmidmid ŚįŹÁöĄśēįÁöĄšł™śēį kkk ŚŹĮšĽ•ÁĒ®šłÄšł™ŚŹėťáŹ cntcntcnt ÁģÄŚćēÁĽüŤģ°„ÄāÁĄ∂ŚźéťÄíŚĹíÁöĄŚĪāśēįśėĮ log‚Ā°m\\log mlogmÔľĆśĮŹšłÄŚĪāšľöťĀćŚéÜšłÄś¨°śČÄśúČśďćšĹúÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶šłļ O(mlog‚Ā°m)O(m\\log m)O(mlogm)„Äā ŤÄÉŤôĎŚ¶āšĹēśĪāÁ¨¨ kkk Ś§ßŚÄľ„ÄāśėĺÁĄ∂ŚŹĮšĽ•ŚŹ™śúČŚąÜÁĽĄťÉ®ŚąÜśúČŚŹėŚĆĖÔľö ŚĮĻšļéšŅģśĒĻśďćšĹú iiiÔľĆśėĺÁĄ∂Ťč• xi>midx_i > midxi‚Äč>mid ťā£šĻąŤŅôšł™śďćšĹúšľöŚĮĻ lftlftlft ŚíĆ rigrigrig ťÄ†śąźŚĹĪŚďćÔľĆšĹÜšłļšļÜšŅĚŤĮĀśó∂ťóīŚ§ćśĚāŚļ¶ÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹ™ŚįÜŚģÉśĒĺŚÖ• rigrigrig šł≠ÔľõŚź¶ŚąôŚŹ™šľöŚĮĻ lftlftlft ťÄ†śąźŚĹĪŚďćÔľĆśĒĺŚÖ• lftlftlft šł≠„Äā ŤÄĆŚĮĻšļéŤĮĘťóģśďćšĹú iiiÔľĆśąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•Ťģ°ÁģóŚáļśďćšĹúŚļŹŚąóśČßŤ°ĆŚąį iii śó∂ŚŹĮťáćťõÜŚÜÖśĮĒ midmidmid Ś§ßÁöĄśēįÁöĄšł™śēį kkk„ÄāŤč• k>=xik>=x_ik>=xi‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąŤĮīśėéŚĹďŚČć midmidmid ŚįŹšļÜÔľĆŤŅôšł™ŤĮĘťóģśďćšĹúťúÄŤ¶ĀŚąÜŚąį rigrigrig ťáĆÔľõŚź¶ŚąôŤĮīśėéŚĹďŚČć midmidmid Ś§ßšļÜśąĖŤÄÖŚĮĻšļÜÔľĆŤŅôšł™ŤĮĘťóģśďćšĹúťúÄŤ¶ĀŚąÜŚąį lftlftlft ťáĆ„ÄāšĹÜśėĮś≥®śĄŹÔľĆk<xik<x_ik<xi‚Äč Ść≥ iii ŤĘęŚąÜŚąį lftlftlft śó∂ÔľĆťúÄŤ¶ĀŚįÜ xix_ixi‚Äč ŚáŹŚéĽ kkk„ÄāŚõ†šłļśąĎšĽ¨Śä†ŚÖ•šŅģśĒĻśďćšĹúśó∂śääśČÄśúČŚĮĻšł§šł™śďćšĹúŚļŹŚąóťÉĹśúČŚĹĪŚďćÁöĄśďćšĹúśĒĺŤŅõšļÜ rigrigrig ŤÄĆś≤°śúČŚä†ŚÖ• lftlftlftÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨ťúÄŤ¶ĀťĘĚŚ§ĖŤģ°ÁģóšłäŤŅôšļõšŅģśĒĻÁöĄŤī°ÁĆģ„Äā ťā£šĻąÁéįŚú®śĚ•ÁúčťĀďšĺčťĘėŚźßÔľö P3332 [ZJOI2013]KŚ§ßśēįśü•ŤĮĘ śėĺÁĄ∂ŤŅėśėĮŚąÜÁĽĄŤŅáÁ®čŚŹėšļÜ„ÄāŚŹĎÁéįŚŹėŚä®ÁöĄŚúįśĖĻŚŹ™śėĮŚćēÁāĻšŅģśĒĻÔľĆśēīśģĶśü•ŤĮĘŚŹėśąźšļÜŚĆļťóīšŅģśĒĻÔľĆŚĆļťóīśü•ŤĮĘ„ÄāśČÄšĽ•ÁĒ®ÁļŅśģĶś†ĎÁĽīśä§ [l,r][l,r][l,r] ŚÜÖŚŹĮťáćťõÜÁöĄŚĻ∂ŚÜÖśĮĒ midmidmid Ś§ßÁöĄśēįÁöĄšł™śēį kkk Ść≥ŚŹĮ„Äā šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; const long long MS=50005; struct node { int tpe,l,r,id; long long val; }; int n,m,quecnt; int ans[MS]; long long sum[MS<<2],lazy[MS<<2]; inline void updata(int u) { sum[u]=sum[u<<1]+sum[u<<1|1]; } inline void lazydown(int u,int l,int r) { if(lazy[u]==0) { return; } int mid=l+r>>1; lazy[u<<1]+=lazy[u]; lazy[u<<1|1]+=lazy[u]; sum[u<<1]+=lazy[u]*(mid-l+1); sum[u<<1|1]+=lazy[u]*(r-mid); lazy[u]=0; } void upd(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,long long k) { if(r<L||l>R) { return; } if(l>=L&&r<=R) { lazy[u]+=k; sum[u]+=k*(r-l+1); return; } lazydown(u,l,r); int mid=l+r>>1; if(L<=mid) { upd(u<<1,l,mid,L,R,k); } if(R>=mid+1) { upd(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R,k); } updata(u); } long long que(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R) { if(r<L||l>R) { return 0; } if(l>=L&&r<=R) { return sum[u]; } lazydown(u,l,r); int mid=l+r>>1; long long res=0; if(L<=mid) { res+=que(u<<1,l,mid,L,R); } if(R>=mid+1) { res+=que(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R); } return res; } void slove(int l,int r,vector<node> &cur) { if(l==r) { for(node x:cur) { if(x.tpe==2) { ans[x.id]=l; } } return; } int mid=l+r>>1; vector<node> lft,rig; for(node x:cur) { if(x.tpe==1) { if(x.val<=mid) { lft.push_back(x); } else { rig.push_back(x); upd(1,1,n,x.l,x.r,1); } } else { long long vl=que(1,1,n,x.l,x.r); if(vl>=x.val) { rig.push_back(x); } else { x.val-=vl; lft.push_back(x); } } } for(node x:rig) { if(x.tpe==1) { upd(1,1,n,x.l,x.r,-1); } } if(lft.size()>0) { slove(l,mid,lft); } if(rig.size()>0) { slove(mid+1,r,rig); } } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); vector<node> a; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { node x; scanf("%d%d%d%lld",&x.tpe,&x.l,&x.r,&x.val); if(x.tpe==2) { x.id=++quecnt; } a.push_back(x); } slove(-n,n,a); for(int i=1;i<=quecnt;i++) { printf("%d\\n",ans[i]); } return 0; } ÁĽÉšĻ†ťĘėÁõģ P3527 [POI2011]MET-Meteors ","tags":[{"name":"ŚąÜś≤Ľ","slug":"xOdsxnJdt","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/xOdsxnJdt/"},{"name":"Ś≠¶šĻ†Á¨ĒŤģį","slug":"-m_OOuWfj","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/-m_OOuWfj/"}],"title":"śēīšĹďšļĆŚąÜŚ≠¶šĻ†Á¨ĒŤģį","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/zheng-ti-er-fen-xue-xi-bi-ji/","stats":{"text":"8 min read","time":446000,"words":1617,"minutes":8},"date":"2023-03-23 16:18:52","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"ÁĒĪšļéÁĹĎÁĽúśĶĀŚõĺšł≠ťô§šļÜśļźÁāĻŚíĆśĪáÁāĻŚ§ĖÔľĆŚÖ∂ŚģÉŤäāÁāĻťÉĹśĽ°Ť∂≥śĶĀŚÖ•ÁöĄśĶĀťáŹÁ≠ČšļéśĶĀŚáļÁöĄśĶĀťáŹ„ÄāśČÄšĽ•śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•ťÄöŤŅáśääŤč•ŚĻ≤Á≠ČŚľŹŤĹ¨śćĘśąźŚõĺśĚ•śĪāŤß£śúÄŚįŹŤīĻÁĒ®ÁöĄÁČĻŤß£ÔľĆšłćÁ≠ČŚľŹŚŹėŚĹĘŚĀöšłÄšłčŚ∑ģŚąÜŚŹėśąźÁ≠ČŚľŹšĻüŚŹĮšĽ•śĪā„Äā ŚÖ∑šĹďÁöĄŚĀöś≥ēśėĮÔľĆŚÖąśääśĮŹšł™Á≠ČŚľŹťÉĹŚŹėŚĹĘ„ÄĀŚĆĖÁģÄÔľĆšĽ§śĮŹšłÄšł™śú™Áü•śēįťÉĹŚú®šłĒšĽÖŚú®šł§šł™Á≠ČŚľŹťáĆŚáļÁéįÔľĆšłĒÁ≥ĽśēįŚąÜŚąęšłļ +1+1+1 ŚíĆ ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1„Äā śé•šłčśĚ•Ôľö ŚĽļÁęčśļźÁāĻ„ÄĀśĪáÁāĻÔľĆŚĻ∂ŚĮĻśĮŹšłÄšł™Á≠ČŚľŹŚĽļšłÄšł™ÁāĻ Ś¶āśěúÁ¨¨ iii šł™šłćÁ≠ČŚľŹŚŹ≥ŤĺĻÁöĄŚłłťáŹšłļťĚěŤīüśēīśēį wiw_iwi‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąšĽé iii ŚźĎśĪáÁāĻŤŅěśĶĀťáŹšłļ wiw_iwi‚ÄčÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ 000 ÁöĄŤĺĻŤ°®Á§ļŚ§öšĹôśēįťáŹŤĘęŚźłŤĶįÔľõŚ¶āśěúÁ¨¨ iii šł™šłćÁ≠ČŚľŹŚŹ≥ŤĺĻÁöĄŚłłťáŹšłļŤīüśēīśēį wiw_iwi‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąšĽéśļźÁāĻŚźĎ iii ŤŅěśĶĀťáŹšłļ ‚ąíwi-w_i‚ąíwi‚ÄčÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ 000 ÁöĄŤĺĻŤ°®Á§ļŚįĎśéČÁöĄśĶĀťáŹŤĘęŤ°•ŚÖÖ Ś¶āśěúśú™Áü•śēį xix_ixi‚Äč Śú®Á≠ČŚľŹ jjj ťáĆÁöĄÁ≥Ľśēįšłļ ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1ÔľĆŚú®Á≠ČŚľŹ kkk ťáĆÁöĄÁ≥Ľśēįšłļ +1+1+1ÔľĆŚĻ∂šłĒŤŅôšł™śú™Áü•śēįŚú®śúÄÁĽąŤģ°ÁģóÁ≠Ēś°ąÁöĄśó∂ŚÄôÁöĄÁ≥Ľśēįšłļ cic_ici‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąšĽé jjj ŚźĎ kkk ŤŅěśĶĀťáŹšłļ inf‚Ā°\\infinfÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ cic_ici‚Äč ÁöĄŤĺĻÔľĆŤ°®Á§ļŤŅôšł™śú™Áü•śēįÁöĄŚÄľšĽéŚ§öŚáļśĚ•ÁöĄÁ≠ČŚľŹśĶĀŚźĎŚįĎśéČÁöĄÁ≠ČŚľŹÔľĆšłĒŤŅôšł™śú™Áü•śēįŚĘěŚ§ßťúÄŤ¶ĀśĒ∂ŚŹĖŤīĻÁĒ®ÔľąŤģ°ÁģóŤŅõÁ≠Ēś°ąÔľČ śúÄŚźéŚą§śĖ≠śúČśó†ŚŹĮŤ°ĆŤß£Ść≥Śą§śĖ≠śėĮŚź¶śĽ°śĶĀÔľĆŤÄĆśúÄŚįŹŤß£Ść≥šłļśúÄŚįŹŤīĻÁĒ®śúÄŚ§ßśĶĀ„Äā šĺčťĘė ŚÖąŚĀáŤģĺŚÖĪ 333 Ś§©ÔľĆÁ¨¨ iii Ś§©śčõŚčü pip_ipi‚Äč šļļÔľĆŚÖĪśúČ 333 ÁĪĽŚŅóśĄŅŤÄÖÔľö Á¨¨šłÄÁĪĽÔľöšĽéÁ¨¨ 111 Ś§©ŚąįÁ¨¨ 333 Ś§©ÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ c1c_1c1‚ÄčÔľĆśčõŚčüšļÜ b1b_1b1‚Äč šļļ Á¨¨šļĆÁĪĽÔľöšĽéÁ¨¨ 222 Ś§©ŚąįÁ¨¨ 333 Ś§©ÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ c2c_2c2‚ÄčÔľĆśčõŚčüšļÜ b2b_2b2‚Äč šļļ Á¨¨šłČÁĪĽÔľöšĽéÁ¨¨ 111 Ś§©ŚąįÁ¨¨ 333 Ś§©ÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ c3c_3c3‚ÄčÔľĆśčõŚčüšļÜ b3b_3b3‚Äč šļļ ŚŹĮšĽ•ŚąóŚáļŚ¶āšłčšłćÁ≠ČŚľŹÔľö p1=b1+b3‚Č•a1p_1=b_1+b_3\\ge a_1 p1‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b3‚Äč‚Č•a1‚Äč p2=b1+b2+b3‚Č•a2p_2=b_1+b_2+b_3\\ge a_2 p2‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b2‚Äč+b3‚Äč‚Č•a2‚Äč p3=b1+b2‚Č•a3p_3=b_1+b_2\\ge a_3 p3‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b2‚Äč‚Č•a3‚Äč ŤÄÉŤôĎŤĹ¨ŚĆĖśąźÁ≠ČŚľŹÔľĆŤģĺÁ¨¨ iii Ś§©śčõŚčüÁöĄšļļśēįŤ∂ÖŚáļśúÄŚįŹšļļśēį did_idi‚Äč šļļÔľĆśėĺÁĄ∂ di‚Č•0d_i\\ge0di‚Äč‚Č•0ÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö p1=b1+b3=a1+d1p_1=b_1+b_3=a_1+d_1 p1‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b3‚Äč=a1‚Äč+d1‚Äč p2=b1+b2+b3=a2+d2p_2=b_1+b_2+b_3=a_2+d_2 p2‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b2‚Äč+b3‚Äč=a2‚Äč+d2‚Äč p3=b1+b2=a3+d3p_3=b_1+b_2=a_3+d_3 p3‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b2‚Äč=a3‚Äč+d3‚Äč ÁõłťāĽšł§šł™Á≠ČŚľŹÁõłŚáŹÔľąťĽėŤģ§Á¨¨ 000 šł™ŚíĆÁ¨¨ 444 šł™Á≠ČŚľŹšłļ 000ÔľČ: p1=b1+b3=a1+d1p_1=b_1+b_3=a_1+d_1 p1‚Äč=b1‚Äč+b3‚Äč=a1‚Äč+d1‚Äč p2‚ąíp1=b2=a2‚ąía1+d2‚ąíd1p_2-p_1=b_2=a_2-a_1+d_2-d_1 p2‚Äč‚ąíp1‚Äč=b2‚Äč=a2‚Äč‚ąía1‚Äč+d2‚Äč‚ąíd1‚Äč p3‚ąíp2=‚ąíb3=a3‚ąía2+d3‚ąíd2p_3-p_2=-b_3=a_3-a_2+d_3-d_2 p3‚Äč‚ąíp2‚Äč=‚ąíb3‚Äč=a3‚Äč‚ąía2‚Äč+d3‚Äč‚ąíd2‚Äč ‚ąíp3=‚ąíb1‚ąíb2=‚ąía3‚ąíd3-p_3=-b_1-b_2=-a_3-d_3 ‚ąíp3‚Äč=‚ąíb1‚Äč‚ąíb2‚Äč=‚ąía3‚Äč‚ąíd3‚Äč śēīÁźÜÔľĆś∂ąŚéĽ pppÔľĆŚĺóÔľö b1+b3‚ąía1‚ąíd1=0b_1+b_3-a_1-d_1=0 b1‚Äč+b3‚Äč‚ąía1‚Äč‚ąíd1‚Äč=0 b2+a1‚ąía2+d1‚ąíd2=0b_2+a_1-a_2+d_1-d_2=0 b2‚Äč+a1‚Äč‚ąía2‚Äč+d1‚Äč‚ąíd2‚Äč=0 ‚ąíb3+a2‚ąía3+d2‚ąíd3=0-b_3+a_2-a_3+d_2-d_3=0 ‚ąíb3‚Äč+a2‚Äč‚ąía3‚Äč+d2‚Äč‚ąíd3‚Äč=0 ‚ąíb1‚ąíb2+a3+d3=0-b_1-b_2+a_3+d_3=0 ‚ąíb1‚Äč‚ąíb2‚Äč+a3‚Äč+d3‚Äč=0 ŚģĻśėďŚŹĎÁéįÔľĆŤŅôś†∑śěĄťÄ†ŚŹĮšĽ•šĽ§Á≠ČŚľŹśĽ°Ť∂≥śĚ°šĽ∂ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ŚŹĮšĽ•ŚĽļŚõĺŤ∑ĎśúÄŚįŹŤīĻÁĒ®śúÄŚ§ßśĶĀśĪāŤß£šļÜ„Äā ŚĽļŚõĺśĖĻŚľŹŚ¶āšłčÔľö ŚĽļÁęčśļźÁāĻ„ÄĀśĪáÁāĻŚíĆ n+1n+1n+1 šł™Á≠ČŚľŹÁāĻ Ś§ĄÁźÜśéČśú™Áü•śēį did_idi‚Äč ŚíĆ aia_iai‚ÄčÔľĆiii ŚźĎ i+1i+1i+1 ŤŅěšłÄśĚ°śĶĀťáŹšłļ inf‚Ā°\\infinfÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ 000 ÁöĄŤĺĻ Ś§ĄÁźÜśéČ bib_ibi‚ÄčÔľĆŚĮĻšļéÁ¨¨ iii ÁĪĽŚŅóśĄŅŤÄÖÔľĆšĽé sis_isi‚Äč ŚźĎ tit_iti‚Äč ŤŅěšłÄśĚ°śĶĀťáŹšłļ inf‚Ā°\\infinfÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ cic_ici‚Äč ÁöĄŤĺĻÔľĆŤ°®Á§ļÁ≠Ēś°ąŤī°ÁĆģŚľŹťáĆÁöĄÁ≥ĽśēįŤģ°Áģó šĽéśļźÁāĻŚźĎ 111 ŤŅěšłÄśĚ°śĶĀťáŹšłļ inf‚Ā°\\infinfÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ 000 ÁöĄŤĺĻÔľõšĽé n+1n+1n+1 ŚźĎśĪáÁāĻŤŅěšłÄśĚ°śĶĀťáŹšłļ inf‚Ā°\\infinfÔľĆŤīĻÁĒ®šłļ 000 ÁöĄŤĺĻÔľĆŤģ©śēīŚľ†Śõĺ‚ÄúśĶĀŤĶ∑śĚ•‚ÄĚ śúÄŚźéŤ∑ĎśúÄŚįŹŤīĻÁĒ®śúÄŚ§ßśĶĀśĪāŚáļśúÄŚįŹŤīĻÁĒ®Ść≥ŚŹĮ„Äā šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> #include <queue> using namespace std; const int S=5000005,MS=100005; const long long inf=1000000007; int n,m,s,t; int esum,to[S],nxt[S],h[MS]; long long c[S],cost[S]; long long dis[MS]; int cur[MS]; bool vis[MS]; long long maxflow,mincost; inline void init() { esum=1; memset(h,0,sizeof(h)); s=0; t=n+2; } inline void add(int x,int y,long long w,long long v) { to[++esum]=y; c[esum]=w; cost[esum]=v; nxt[esum]=h[x]; h[x]=esum; } inline bool spfa() { memset(dis,127,sizeof(dis)); memset(vis,0,sizeof(vis)); long long inf=dis[0]; queue<int> q; dis[s]=0; vis[s]=true; q.push(s); while(!q.empty()) { int u=q.front(); q.pop(); vis[u]=false; for(int i=h[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i]; long long w=cost[i]; if(c[i]>0&&dis[u]+w<dis[v]) { dis[v]=dis[u]+w; if(!vis[v]) { vis[v]=true; q.push(v); } } } } return dis[t]<inf; } long long dfs(int u,long long w) { if(u==t) { return w; } vis[u]=true; long long sum=0; for(int &i=cur[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i]; if(c[i]>0&&dis[v]==dis[u]+cost[i]&&!vis[v]) { long long re=dfs(v,min(w,c[i])); mincost+=re*cost[i]; c[i]-=re; c[i^1]+=re; w-=re; sum+=re; if(w==0) { break; } } } vis[u]=false; return sum; } inline void mcmf() { mincost=0; maxflow=0; while(spfa()) { for(int i=s;i<=t;i++) { cur[i]=h[i]; } maxflow+=dfs(s,1e17); } } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); init(); add(s,1,inf,0); add(1,s,0,0); add(n+1,t,inf,0); add(t,n+1,0,0); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { long long x; scanf("%lld",&x); add(i,i+1,inf-x,0); add(i+1,i,0,0); } for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int l,r; long long need; scanf("%d%d%lld",&l,&r,&need); add(l,r+1,1e17,need); add(r+1,l,0,-need); } mcmf(); printf("%lld\\n",mincost); return 0; } min read","time":401000,"words":1369,"minutes":7},"date":"2023-03-23 16:17:59","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"śúČšļõś†ĎšłäśďćšĹúťĘėÁõģťúÄŤ¶ĀśćĘś†ĻśďćšĹúÔľĆÁĒ®śôģťÄöÁöĄś†ĎťďĺŚČĖŚąÜśó†ś≥ēŤß£ŚÜ≥ś≠§ÁĪĽťóģťĘė„ÄāŤŅôśó∂śąĎšĽ¨ŚįĪťúÄŤ¶ĀśĒĻťÄ†šłÄšłčś†ĎŚČĖÔľĆšĽ§ŚģÉśĒĮśĆĀśćĘś†ĻśďćšĹú„Äā ť¶ĖŚÖąŤāĮŚģöšłćŚŹĮŤÉĹśĮŹś¨°ťÉĹťáćśĖįŚČĖŚąÜÔľĆŚõ†šłļťā£ś†∑šľö TLE„Äāťā£šĻąŤÄÉŤôĎšĽ• 111 šłļś†ĻŚČĖÔľĆŤģįšłčŚĹďŚČćÁöĄŤ∑ü rtrtrtÔľĆŚĮĻšļéśĮŹšł™śďćšĹúÁČĻśģäŚ§ĄÁźÜ„Äā śúÄŤŅĎŚÖ¨ŚÖĪÁ•ĖŚÖą ŤÄÉŤôĎÁĒ® lca‚Ā°(x,y)\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)lca(x,y) Ť°®Á§ļšĽ• 111 šłļś†Ļśó∂ xxx ŚíĆ yyy ÁöĄśúÄŤŅĎŚÖ¨ŚÖĪÁ•ĖŚÖąÔľĆÁĒ® LCA‚Ā°(x,y)\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)LCA(x,y) Ť°®Á§ļśćĘś†ĻŚźé xxx ŚíĆ yyy ÁöĄśúÄŤŅĎŚÖ¨ŚÖĪÁ•ĖŚÖąÔľąŤŅôťáĆťĽėŤģ§ xxx ś∑ĪŚļ¶ŚįŹšļéÁ≠Čšļé yyyÔľČ„Äā Ťč• lca‚Ā°(x,y)=x\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)=xlca(x,y)=xÔľöÔľąŚõĺšł≠ÁĽŅŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻśėĮ xxxÔľĆÁļĘŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻśėĮ yyyÔľĆšłćŚźĆťĘúŤČ≤ÁöĄŤäāÁāĻśėĮšłćŚźĆśÉÖŚÜĶšłč rtrtrt ÁöĄšĹćÁĹģÔľČ (1) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéťĽĄŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=x‚ąßlca‚Ā°(y,rt)=y\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=x\\land\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)=ylca(x,rt)=x‚ąßlca(y,rt)=yÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=y\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=yLCA(x,y)=y (2) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéś©ôŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=x‚ąßlca‚Ā°(y,rt)ÓÄ†=y\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=x\\land\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)\\not=ylca(x,rt)=x‚ąßlca(y,rt)ÓÄ†‚Äč=yÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=lca‚Ā°(y,rt)\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)LCA(x,y)=lca(y,rt) (3) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéÁ≤ČŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ lca‚Ā°(x,rt)ÓÄ†=x\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)\\not=xlca(x,rt)ÓÄ†‚Äč=xÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=lca‚Ā°(x,y)\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)LCA(x,y)=lca(x,y) Ťč• lca‚Ā°(x,y)ÓÄ†=x\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)\\not=xlca(x,y)ÓÄ†‚Äč=xÔľöÔľąŚõĺšł≠ÁĽŅŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻśėĮ xxxÔľĆÁļĘŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻśėĮ yyyÔľĆšłćŚźĆťĘúŤČ≤ÁöĄŤäāÁāĻśėĮšłćŚźĆśÉÖŚÜĶšłč rtrtrt ÁöĄšĹćÁĹģÔľČ (1) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéÁĀįŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=x\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=xlca(x,rt)=xÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=x\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=xLCA(x,y)=x (2) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéŤďĚŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=y\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=ylca(x,rt)=yÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=y\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=yLCA(x,y)=y (3) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéÁ≤ČŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=lca‚Ā°(y,rt)\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)lca(x,rt)=lca(y,rt)ÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=lca‚Ā°(x,y)\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)LCA(x,y)=lca(x,y) (4) Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéś©ôŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ (lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=rt‚ąßlca‚Ā°(y,rt)=lca‚Ā°(x,y))‚ą®(lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=lca‚Ā°(x,y)‚ąßlca‚Ā°(y,rt)=y)(\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=rt\\land\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)=\\operatorname{lca}(x,y))\\lor(\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)\\land\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)=y)(lca(x,rt)=rt‚ąßlca(y,rt)=lca(x,y))‚ą®(lca(x,rt)=lca(x,y)‚ąßlca(y,rt)=y)ÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=rt\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=rtLCA(x,y)=rt (5) Ťč•šĽ•šłäśĚ°šĽ∂ŚĚášłćśĽ°Ť∂≥ÔľĆťā£šĻąŤč• lca‚Ā°(x,rt)=lca‚Ā°(x,y)\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=\\operatorname{lca}(x,y)lca(x,rt)=lca(x,y)ÔľĆťā£šĻą LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=lca‚Ā°(x,rt)\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)LCA(x,y)=lca(x,rt)ÔľĆŚź¶Śąô LCA‚Ā°(x,y)=lca‚Ā°(y,rt)\\operatorname{LCA}(x,y)=\\operatorname{lca}(y,rt)LCA(x,y)=lca(y,rt) šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö inline int getLCA(int x,int y) { if(dep[x]>dep[y]) { swap(x,y); } int xr=getlca(x,rt),yr=getlca(y,rt),xy=getlca(x,y); if(xy==x) { if(xr==x&&yr==y) { return y; } if(xr==x) { return yr; } return x; } else { if(xr==x||yr==y) { return xr==x?x:y; } if(xr==yr) { return xy; } if((xr==rt&&yr==xy)||(xr==xy&&yr==rt)) { return rt; } return xr==xy?yr:xr; } } ťďĺšłäŤĮĘťóģ/šŅģśĒĻ śėĺÁĄ∂śó†Ťģļś†ĻśÄéšĻąśćĘÔľĆťďĺ (u,v)(u,v)(u,v) šłäÁöĄŤäāÁāĻťÉĹšłćšľöśĒĻŚŹėÔľĆśČÄšĽ•Áõīśé•šŅģśĒĻŚć≥ŚŹĮ„Äā Ś≠źś†ĎŚÜÖŤĮĘťóģ/šŅģśĒĻ Śõĺšł≠ÁĽŅŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻśėĮ xxx„Äā Ťč• rt=xrt=xrt=xÔľĆťā£šĻąśü•ŤĮĘ/šŅģśĒĻśēīś£ĶŚ≠źś†Ď Ťč• rtrtrt šĹćšļéťĽĄŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆŚć≥ $\\operatorname{lca}(x,rt)=xÔľĆťā£šĻąśü•ŤĮĘ/šŅģśĒĻ xxx Ś≠źś†Ďťô§šļÜ rtrtrt śĖĻŚźĎŚĄŅŚ≠źÁöĄŚ≠źś†ĎŚ§ĖśČÄśúČÁöĄŤäāÁāĻ Śź¶ŚąôŤĮīśėé rtrtrt šĹćšļéÁ≤ČŤČ≤ŚĆļŚüüÔľĆťā£šĻąśü•ŤĮĘ/śĪāśĒĻ xxx Ś≠źś†ĎŚć≥ŚŹĮ šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö inline int jump(int x,int k) { for(int i=25;i>=0;i--) { if(k&(1<<i)) { x=up[x][i]; } } return x; } inline int quesubtree(int x) { if(x==rt) { return que(1,1,n,1,n); } int xr; if(dep[rt]>dep[x]&&up[xr=jump(rt,dep[rt]-dep[x]-1)][0]==x) { if(id[xr]==1) { return que(1,1,n,R[xr]+1,n); } if(R[xr]==n) { return que(1,1,n,1,id[xr]-1); } return min(que(1,1,n,1,id[xr]-1),que(1,1,n,R[xr]+1,n)); } return que(1,1,n,id[x],R[x]); } ś®°śĚŅťĘėšĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const long long S=1000005,MS=100005; const int inf=2147483647; int n,m,val[MS]; int esum,to[S],nxt[S],h[MS]; int up[MS][30],dep[MS],siz[MS],hson[MS]; int cnt,id[MS],top[MS],a[MS],R[MS]; int minn[MS<<2],lazy[MS<<2]; int rt; inline void add(int x,int y) { to[++esum]=y; nxt[esum]=h[x]; h[x]=esum; } void dfs1(int u,int fa) { up[u][0]=fa; for(int i=1;i<=25;i++) { up[u][i]=up[up[u][i-1]][i-1]; } dep[u]=dep[fa]+1; siz[u]=1; for(int i=h[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i]; if(v==fa) { continue; } dfs1(v,u); siz[u]+=siz[v]; if(siz[v]>siz[hson[u]]) { hson[u]=v; } } } void dfs2(int u,int tpf) { id[u]=++cnt; top[u]=tpf; a[cnt]=val[u]; if(hson[u]!=0) { dfs2(hson[u],tpf); } for(int i=h[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i]; if(v==up[u][0]||v==hson[u]) { continue; } dfs2(v,v); } R[u]=cnt; } void build(int u,int l,int r) { lazy[u]=-1; if(l==r) { minn[u]=a[l]; return; } int mid=l+r>>1; build(u<<1,l,mid); build(u<<1|1,mid+1,r); minn[u]=min(minn[u<<1],minn[u<<1|1]); } void upd(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,int k) { if(l>R||r<L) { return; } if(l>=L&&r<=R) { minn[u]=k; lazy[u]=k; return; } if(lazy[u]!=-1) { minn[u<<1]=lazy[u]; minn[u<<1|1]=lazy[u]; lazy[u<<1]=lazy[u]; lazy[u<<1|1]=lazy[u]; lazy[u]=-1; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(L<=mid) { upd(u<<1,l,mid,L,R,k); } if(R>=mid+1) { upd(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R,k); } minn[u]=min(minn[u<<1],minn[u<<1|1]); } int que(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R) { if(l>R||r<l) { return inf; } if(l>=L&&r<=R) { return minn[u]; } if(lazy[u]!=-1) { minn[u<<1]=lazy[u]; minn[u<<1|1]=lazy[u]; lazy[u<<1]=lazy[u]; lazy[u<<1|1]=lazy[u]; lazy[u]=-1; } int mid=l+r>>1,res=inf; if(L<=mid) { res=min(res,que(u<<1,l,mid,L,R)); } if(R>=mid+1) { res=min(res,que(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R)); } return res; } inline int jump(int x,int k) { for(int i=25;i>=0;i--) { if(k&(1<<i)) { x=up[x][i]; } } return x; } inline int getlca(int x,int y) { if(dep[x]<dep[y]) { swap(x,y); } for(int i=25;i>=0;i--) { if(dep[up[x][i]]>=dep[y]) { x=up[x][i]; } } if(x==y) { return x; } for(int i=25;i>=0;i--) { if(up[x][i]!=up[y][i]) { x=up[x][i]; y=up[y][i]; } } return up[x][0]; } inline int getLCA(int x,int y) { if(dep[x]>dep[y]) { swap(x,y); } int xr=getlca(x,rt),yr=getlca(y,rt),xy=getlca(x,y); if(xy==x) { if(xr==x&&yr==y) { return y; } if(xr==x) { return yr; } return x; } else { if(xr==x||yr==y) { return xr==x?x:y; } if(xr==yr) { return xy; } if((xr==rt&&yr==xy)||(xr==xy&&yr==rt)) { return rt; } return xr==xy?yr:xr; } } inline void updpath(int x,int y,int k) { while(top[x]!=top[y]) { if(dep[top[x]]>dep[top[y]]) { upd(1,1,n,id[top[x]],id[x],k); x=up[top[x]][0]; } else { upd(1,1,n,id[top[y]],id[y],k); y=up[top[y]][0]; } } upd(1,1,n,min(id[x],id[y]),max(id[x],id[y]),k); } inline int quesubtree(int x) { if(x==rt) { return que(1,1,n,1,n); } int xr; if(dep[rt]>dep[x]&&up[xr=jump(rt,dep[rt]-dep[x]-1)][0]==x) { if(id[xr]==1) { return que(1,1,n,R[xr]+1,n); } if(R[xr]==n) { return que(1,1,n,1,id[xr]-1); } return min(que(1,1,n,1,id[xr]-1),que(1,1,n,R[xr]+1,n)); } return que(1,1,n,id[x],R[x]); } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); add(x,y); add(y,x); } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&val[i]); } scanf("%d",&rt); dfs1(1,0); dfs2(1,1); build(1,1,n); while(m--) { int op; scanf("%d",&op); if(op==1) { scanf("%d",&rt); } else if(op==2) { int x,y,k; scanf("%d%d%d",&x,&y,&k); updpath(x,y,k); } else { int x; scanf("%d",&x); printf("%d\\n",quesubtree(x)); } } return 0; } ÁĽÉšĻ†ťĘėÁõģ CF916E Jamie and Tree ‚ą£Ai‚ą™A2‚ą™‚čĮ‚ą™An‚ą£=(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i‚Č§n‚ą£Ai‚ą£)‚ąí(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i<j‚Č§n‚ą£Ai‚ą©Aj‚ą£)+(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i<j<k‚Č§n‚ą£Ai‚ą©Aj‚ą©Ak‚ą£)‚ąí‚čĮ+(‚ąí1)n‚ąí1√ó‚ą£A1‚ą©A2‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©An‚ą£|A_i\\cup A_2\\cup\\dots\\cup A_n|=\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i\\le n}|A_i|\\right)-\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j\\le n}|A_i\\cap A_j|\\right)+\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j<k\\le n}|A_i\\cap A_j\\cap A_k|\\right)-\\dots+(-1)^{n-1}\\times|A_1\\cap A_2\\cap\\dots\\cap A_n| ‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą™A2‚Äč‚ą™‚čĮ‚ą™An‚Äč‚ą£=(1‚Č§i‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą£)‚ąí(1‚Č§i<j‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą©Aj‚Äč‚ą£)+‚éĚ‚éõ‚Äč1‚Č§i<j<k‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą©Aj‚Äč‚ą©Ak‚Äč‚ą£‚é†‚éě‚Äč‚ąí‚čĮ+(‚ąí1)n‚ąí1√ó‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą©A2‚Äč‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©An‚Äč‚ą£ ŤŅôŚÖ∂ŚģěŚĺąŚ•ĹÁźÜŤß£ÔľĆŚįĪśėĮŚáŹśéČÁģóťáćšłÄś¨°ÁöĄÔľĆŚä†šłäÁģóťáćšł§ś¨°ÁöĄÔľĆŚáŹśéČÁģóťáćšłČś¨°ÁöĄ‚Ä¶‚Ä¶ ŚŹėŚĹĘšłÄšłčÔľĆśúČÔľöÔľąAicA_i^cAic‚Äč śėĮ AiA_iAi‚Äč ÁöĄŤ°•ťõÜÔľĆSSS śėĮŚÖ®ťõÜÔľČ ‚ą£Aic‚ą©A2c‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©Anc‚ą£=‚ą£S‚ą£‚ąí(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i‚Č§n‚ą£Ai‚ą£)+(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i<j‚Č§n‚ą£Ai‚ą©Aj‚ą£)‚ąí(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i<j<k‚Č§n‚ą£Ai‚ą©Aj‚ą©Ak‚ą£)+‚čĮ+(‚ąí1)n√ó‚ą£A1‚ą©A2‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©An‚ą£|A_i^c\\cap A_2^c\\cap\\dots\\cap A_n^c|=|S|-\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i\\le n}|A_i|\\right)+\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j\\le n}|A_i\\cap A_j|\\right)-\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j<k\\le n}|A_i\\cap A_j\\cap A_k|\\right)+\\dots+(-1)^n\\times|A_1\\cap A_2\\cap\\dots\\cap A_n| ‚ą£Aic‚Äč‚ą©A2c‚Äč‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©Anc‚Äč‚ą£=‚ą£S‚ą£‚ąí(1‚Č§i‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą£)+(1‚Č§i<j‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą©Aj‚Äč‚ą£)‚ąí‚éĚ‚éõ‚Äč1‚Č§i<j<k‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą©Aj‚Äč‚ą©Ak‚Äč‚ą£‚é†‚éě‚Äč+‚čĮ+(‚ąí1)n√ó‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą©A2‚Äč‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©An‚Äč‚ą£ ÁĒĪšļéŤ°•ťõÜÁöĄŤ°•ťõÜśėĮŚéüťõÜÔľĆśČÄšĽ•śúČÔľö ‚ą£Ai‚ą©A2‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©An‚ą£=‚ą£S‚ą£‚ąí(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i‚Č§n‚ą£Aic‚ą£)+(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i<j‚Č§n‚ą£Aic‚ą©Ajc‚ą£)‚ąí(‚ąĎ1‚Č§i<j<k‚Č§n‚ą£Aic‚ą©Ajc‚ą©Akc‚ą£)+‚čĮ+(‚ąí1)n√ó‚ą£A1c‚ą©A2c‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©Anc‚ą£|A_i\\cap A_2\\cap\\dots\\cap A_n|=|S|-\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i\\le n}|A_i^c|\\right)+\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j\\le n}|A_i^c\\cap A_j^c|\\right)-\\left(\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j<k\\le n}|A_i^c\\cap A_j^c\\cap A_k^c|\\right)+\\dots+(-1)^n\\times|A_1^c\\cap A_2^c\\cap\\dots\\cap A_n^c| ‚ą£Ai‚Äč‚ą©A2‚Äč‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©An‚Äč‚ą£=‚ą£S‚ą£‚ąí(1‚Č§i‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Aic‚Äč‚ą£)+(1‚Č§i<j‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Aic‚Äč‚ą©Ajc‚Äč‚ą£)‚ąí‚éĚ‚éõ‚Äč1‚Č§i<j<k‚Č§n‚ąĎ‚Äč‚ą£Aic‚Äč‚ą©Ajc‚Äč‚ą©Akc‚Äč‚ą£‚é†‚éě‚Äč+‚čĮ+(‚ąí1)n√ó‚ą£A1c‚Äč‚ą©A2c‚Äč‚ą©‚čĮ‚ą©Anc‚Äč‚ą£ ŤÄÉŤôĎšłÄÁßćÁČĻśģäśÉÖŚÜĶÔľĆťõÜŚźąÁöĄšļ§ťõÜŚ§ßŚįŹšĻčŚíĆťõÜŚźąšł™śēįśúČŚÖ≥„ÄāŤģĺ f(n)f(n)f(n) Ť°®Á§ļ nnn šł™ťõÜŚźąÁöĄŤ°•ťõÜÁöĄšļ§ťõÜŚ§ßŚįŹÔľĆg(n)g(n)g(n) Ť°®Á§ļ nnn šł™ťõÜŚźąÁöĄšļ§ťõÜŚ§ßŚįŹÔľĆťā£šĻąšłäťĚĘšł§śĚ°ŚľŹŚ≠źŚŹĮšĽ•ŚÜôśąźÔľö f(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(‚ąí1)i(ni)g(i)f(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}g(i) f(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)i(in‚Äč)g(i) g(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(‚ąí1)i(ni)f(i)g(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}f(i) g(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)i(in‚Äč)f(i) śČÄšĽ•ŤŅôšł§śĚ°ŚľŹŚ≠źśėĮÁ≠ČšĽ∑ÁöĄŚÖ≥Á≥ĽÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČÔľö f(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(‚ąí1)i(ni)g(i) ‚üļ g(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(‚ąí1)i(ni)f(i)f(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}g(i)\\iff g(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}f(i) f(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)i(in‚Äč)g(i)‚üļg(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)i(in‚Äč)f(i) ŤŅôŚįĪśėĮšļĆť°ĻŚľŹŚŹćśľĒÁöĄŚĹĘŚľŹšłÄ„Äā śõīŚ§öŚĹĘŚľŹ ŚĹĘŚľŹšļĆ f(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(ni)g(i) ‚üļ g(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(‚ąí1)n‚ąíi(ni)f(i)f(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n\\dbinom{n}{i}g(i)\\iff g(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^{n-i}\\dbinom{n}{i}f(i) f(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(in‚Äč)g(i)‚üļg(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)n‚ąíi(in‚Äč)f(i) ŤĮĀśėéÔľö šĽ§ h(n)=(‚ąí1)ng(n)h(n)=(-1)^n g(n)h(n)=(‚ąí1)ng(n)ÔľĆťā£šĻąŚł¶ŚÖ•ŚĹĘŚľŹšłÄśúČ f(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(ni)h(i) ‚üļ h(n)(‚ąí1)n=g(n)=‚ąĎi=0n(‚ąí1)i(ni)f(i)f(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n\\binom{n}{i}h(i)\\iff \\frac{h(n)}{(-1)^n}=g(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}f(i)f(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(in‚Äč)h(i)‚üļ(‚ąí1)nh(n)‚Äč=g(n)=i=0‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)i(in‚Äč)f(i)ÔľĆśēīÁźÜŚźéŚć≥ŚĺóŤĮĀ„Äā ŚĹĘŚľŹšłČ f(n)=‚ąĎi=nm(in)g(i) ‚üļ g(n)=‚ąĎi=nm(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(in)f(i)f(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^m\\binom{i}{n}g(i)\\iff g(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^m(-1)^{i-n}\\binom{i}{n}f(i) f(n)=i=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(ni‚Äč)g(i)‚üļg(n)=i=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(ni‚Äč)f(i) ŤĮĀśėéÔľö ÁĽĄŚźąśĄŹšĻČśėĮ f(n)f(n)f(n) Ť°®Á§ļťí¶Śģö nnn šł™ťÄČÔľĆg(n)g(n)g(n) Ť°®Á§ļśĀįŚ•ĹťÄČ nnn šł™„ÄāŚõ†šłļ f(n)f(n)f(n) ŚźĆšłÄÁßćśĖĻś°ąšľöŤģ°ÁģóŚ§öś¨°ÔľĆŚÖ∑šĹďÁöĄÔľĆťÄČ nnn šł™ÁöĄśĖĻś°ąťí¶ŚģöťÄČ iii šł™ŚįĪšľöťáćŚ§ćŤģ°Áģó (ni)\\binom{n}{i}(in‚Äč) ś¨°ÔľĆśČÄšĽ• f(n)=‚ąĎi=nm(in)g(i)f(n)=\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^m\\binom{i}{n}g(i)f(n)=i=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(ni‚Äč)g(i)„ÄāŤÄĆ g(n)=‚ąĎi=nm(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(in)f(i)=‚ąĎi=nm(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(in)‚ąĎj=im(ji)g(j)=‚ąĎj=nmg(j)‚ąĎi=nj(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(in)(ji)=‚ąĎj=nmg(j)‚ąĎi=nj(‚ąí1)i‚ąíni!n!(i‚ąín)!j!i!(j‚ąíi)!=‚ąĎj=nmg(j)‚ąĎi=nj(‚ąí1)i‚ąínj!n!(i‚ąín)!(j‚ąíi)!=‚ąĎj=nmg(j)‚ąĎi=nj(‚ąí1)i‚ąínj!(j‚ąín)!n!(i‚ąín)!(j‚ąíi)!(j‚ąín)!=‚ąĎj=nm(jn)g(j)‚ąĎi=nj(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(j‚ąíni‚ąín)=‚ąĎj=nm(jn)g(j)‚ąĎi=0j‚ąín(‚ąí1)i(j‚ąíni)=‚ąĎj=nm(jn)g(j)(1‚ąí1)j‚ąín=‚ąĎj=nm(jn)g(j)[j==n]=(nn)g(n)=g(n)\\begin{aligned} g(n)&=\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^m(-1)^{i-n}\\binom{i}{n}f(i)\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^m(-1)^{i-n}\\binom{i}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=i}^m\\binom{j}{i}g(j)\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^mg(j)\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^j(-1)^{i-n}\\binom{i}{n}\\binom{j}{i}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^mg(j)\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^j(-1)^{i-n}\\frac{i!}{n!(i-n)!}\\frac{j!}{i!(j-i)!}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^mg(j)\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^j(-1)^{i-n}\\frac{j!}{n!(i-n)!(j-i)!}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^mg(j)\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^j(-1)^{i-n}\\frac{j!(j-n)!}{n!(i-n)!(j-i)!(j-n)!}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^m\\binom{j}{n}g(j)\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^j(-1)^{i-n}\\binom{j-n}{i-n}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^m\\binom{j}{n}g(j)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{j-n}(-1)^{i}\\binom{j-n}{i}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^m\\binom{j}{n}g(j)(1-1)^{j-n}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j=n}^m\\binom{j}{n}g(j)[j==n]\\\\ &=\\binom{n}{n}g(n)\\\\ &=g(n)\\\\ \\end{aligned} g(n)‚Äč=i=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(ni‚Äč)f(i)=i=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(ni‚Äč)j=i‚ąĎm‚Äč(ij‚Äč)g(j)=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äčg(j)i=n‚ąĎj‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(ni‚Äč)(ij‚Äč)=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äčg(j)i=n‚ąĎj‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąínn!(i‚ąín)!i!‚Äči!(j‚ąíi)!j!‚Äč=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äčg(j)i=n‚ąĎj‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąínn!(i‚ąín)!(j‚ąíi)!j!‚Äč=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äčg(j)i=n‚ąĎj‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąínn!(i‚ąín)!(j‚ąíi)!(j‚ąín)!j!(j‚ąín)!‚Äč=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(nj‚Äč)g(j)i=n‚ąĎj‚Äč(‚ąí1)i‚ąín(i‚ąínj‚ąín‚Äč)=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(nj‚Äč)g(j)i=0‚ąĎj‚ąín‚Äč(‚ąí1)i(ij‚ąín‚Äč)=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(nj‚Äč)g(j)(1‚ąí1)j‚ąín=j=n‚ąĎm‚Äč(nj‚Äč)g(j)[j==n]=(nn‚Äč)g(n)=g(n)‚Äč śČÄšĽ•ŚĺóŤĮĀ„Äā šĺčťĘė bzoj 2839 ťõÜŚźąŤģ°śēį Ťģĺ f(i)f(i)f(i) Ť°®Á§ļťí¶Śģöšļ§ťõÜśúČ iii šł™ÁöĄśĖĻś°ąśēįÔľĆg(i)g(i)g(i) Ť°®Á§ļšļ§ťõÜśĀįŚ•ĹśúČ iii šł™ÁöĄśĖĻś°ąśēįÔľĆťā£šĻąśúČ f(i)=(ni)(22n‚ąíi‚ąí1)f(i)=\\binom{n}{i}(2^{2^{n-i}}-1)f(i)=(in‚Äč)(22n‚ąíi‚ąí1)ÔľĆf(i)=‚ąĎj=in(ji)g(j)f(i)=\\sum\\limits_{j=i}^n\\binom{j}{i}g(j)f(i)=j=i‚ąĎn‚Äč(ij‚Äč)g(j)ÔľĆŚŹćśľĒšłÄšłčŚĺóŚąį g(i)=‚ąĎj=in(‚ąí1)j‚ąíi(ji)f(j)g(i)=\\sum\\limits_{j=i}^n(-1)^{j-i}\\binom{j}{i}f(j)g(i)=j=i‚ąĎn‚Äč(‚ąí1)j‚ąíi(ij‚Äč)f(j)ÔľĆÁĒĪšļéŚŹ™Ť¶ĀÁģóšłÄś¨°ÔľĆśČÄšĽ•Áõīśé•ÁģóŚįĪŤ°ĆšļÜ„Äā šĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=1000005,p=1000000007; int fra[S],inv[S]; int n,k; int f[S]; inline int qpow(int x,int y,int p) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1,x=1ll*x*x%p) res=(y&1)?1ll*res*x%p:res; return res; } inline int C(int n,int m) { return 1ll*fra[n]*inv[n-m]%p*inv[m]%p; } int main() { fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) fra[i]=1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p; inv[S-3]=qpow(fra[S-3],p-2,p); for(int i=S-3;i>=1;i--) inv[i-1]=1ll*inv[i]*i%p; scanf("%d%d",&n,&k); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) f[i]=1ll*C(n,i)*((long long)qpow(2,qpow(2,n-i,p-1),p)-1+p)%p; int ans=0; for(int i=k;i<=n;i++) { int pre=1ll*C(i,k)*f[i]%p; if(i-k&1) ans=(ans-pre+p)%p; else ans=(ans+pre)%p; } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } šĻ†ťĘė P4859 Ś∑≤ÁĽŹś≤°śúČšĽÄšĻąŚ•ĹŚģ≥śÄēÁöĄšļÜ P5505 [JSOI2011]ŚąÜÁČĻšļß min read","time":670000,"words":1946,"minutes":12},"date":"2023-03-23 16:11:37","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"ś†ĎšłäśúÄŚįŹ k Ť¶ÜÁõĖťóģťĘėśėĮšłÄÁßćŚĺąŚÖłŚěčÁöĄś†ĎšłäŤī™ŚŅÉťóģťĘėÔľĆŤŅôťáĆŚĀöšłÄšłčŚįŹÁĽď„Äā ś†ĎšłäśúÄŚįŹ k Ť¶ÜÁõĖťóģťĘėÁöĄŚĹĘŚľŹšłÄŤą¨śėĮÔľö ÁĽôŚģöšłÄś£Ķś†ĎÔľĆŤĺĻśúČŤĺĻśĚÉÔľĆÁāĻ uuu śúČśĽ°Ť∂≥ du‚ąą{0,1}d_u\\in\\{0,1\\}du‚Äč‚ąą{0,1} ÁöĄÁāĻśĚÉ dud_udu‚ÄčÔľĆÁßįśČÄśúČśĽ°Ť∂≥ du=1d_u=1du‚Äč=1 ÁöĄ uuu šłļ‚ÄúŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻ‚ÄĚ„Äā šĹ†ťúÄŤ¶ĀťÄČšł≠šłÄšļõÁāĻÔľĆšĽ§śČÄśúČÁöĄ‚ÄúŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻ‚ÄĚŤĘęŤŅôšļõÁāĻŤ¶ÜÁõĖ„ÄāšłÄšł™‚ÄúŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻ‚ÄĚxxx ŤĘę‚ÄúŤ¶ÜÁõĖ‚ÄĚšļÜŚĹďšłĒšĽÖŚĹďŚ≠ėŚú®šłÄšł™šĹ†ťÄČšł≠ÁöĄÁāĻ yyyÔľĆśĽ°Ť∂≥ xxx ŚíĆ yyy šĻčťóīÁöĄŤ∑ĚÁ¶ĽŚįŹšļéÁ≠Čšļé kkkÔľĆšĹ†ťúÄŤ¶ĀśúÄŚįŹŚĆĖťÄČšł≠ÁöĄÁāĻÁöĄśēįťáŹ„Äā ŤŅôšł™ťóģťĘėśúČŤĮłŚ§öŚŹėŚĹĘÔľĆśĮĒŤĺÉŚłłŤßĀÁöĄśėĮťÖćŚźąšļĆŚąÜÁ≠Ēś°ąśĚ•ŤÄÉ„Äā śąĎšĽ¨ŚŹĮšĽ•šĹŅÁĒ®ś†ĎšłäŤī™ŚŅÉśĚ•Ťß£ŚÜ≥ŤŅôšł™ťóģťĘė„Äā ť¶ĖŚÖąŤģĺ fuf_ufu‚Äč Ť°®Á§ļ uuu Ś≠źś†ĎŚÜÖŤ∑ĚÁ¶Ľ uuu śúÄŤŅúÁöĄśú™ŤĘęŤ¶ÜÁõĖÁöĄŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻŤ∑Ě uuu ÁöĄŤ∑ĚÁ¶ĽÔľĆśėĺÁĄ∂ fu=max‚Ā°{fx+1,x‚ąąsonu}f_u=\\max\\{f_x+1,x\\in son_u\\}fu‚Äč=max{fx‚Äč+1,x‚ąąsonu‚Äč}„Äā ŤÄÉŤôĎŤ∑ĚÁ¶Ľ uuu śúÄŤŅúÁöĄśú™ŤĘęŤ¶ÜÁõĖÁöĄŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻ vvvÔľĆvvv śėĺÁĄ∂śúČŚŹĮŤÉĹŤĘę uuu Ś≠źś†ĎťáĆÁöĄÁāĻŤ¶ÜÁõĖÔľĆšĻüśúČŚŹĮŤÉĹŤĘę uuu ÁöĄÁą∂šļ≤Ť¶ÜÁõĖÔľĆśąĖŤÄÖŤĘę uuu ÁöĄŚÖĄŚľüŚ≠źś†ĎťáĆÁöĄÁāĻŤ¶ÜÁõĖ„Äāťā£šĻąśąĎšĽ¨ŚÖąŤÄÉŤôĎŤĘę uuu ÁöĄŚ≠źś†ĎťáĆÁöĄÁāĻŤ¶ÜÁõĖÁöĄśÉÖŚÜĶÔľĆśėĺÁĄ∂ÁĒĽŚáļśĚ•śó∂ŤŅôś†∑ÁöĄÔľöÔľąťĽĄŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻšĽ£Ť°® vvvÔľĆÁĽŅŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻšĽ£Ť°®šłÄšł™Ś∑≤ÁĽŹŤĘęťÄČšł≠šłĒŤ¶ÜÁõĖťĽĄŤČ≤ŤäāÁāĻÁöĄÁāĻ wwwÔľČ śėĺÁĄ∂ÔľĆvvv ŚíĆ www ÁöĄŤ∑ĚÁ¶ĽÔľĆšĻüŚįĪśėĮ fuf_ufu‚Äč Śä†šłä www ŚíĆ uuu ÁöĄŤ∑ĚÁ¶Ľ„Äāťā£šĻąśąĎšĽ¨ŚįĪŤ¶ĀŤģ© www ŚíĆ uuu ÁöĄŤ∑ĚÁ¶ĽŚįĹŚŹĮŤÉĹÁü≠ÔľĆšłćŚ¶®ŤģĺŚģÉšłļ gug_ugu‚ÄčÔľĆťā£šĻąśėĺÁĄ∂ gu=min‚Ā°{gx+1,x‚ąąsonu}g_u=\\min\\{g_x+1,x\\in son_u\\}gu‚Äč=min{gx‚Äč+1,x‚ąąsonu‚Äč}„Äā śé•šłčśĚ•ŚąÜÁĪĽŤģ®ŤģļÔľö Ťč• fu+gu‚Č§kf_u+g_u\\le kfu‚Äč+gu‚Äč‚Č§kÔľĆťā£šĻą uuu ÁöĄŚ≠źś†ĎŤÉĹŤá™ÁĽôŤá™Ť∂≥ÔľĆŤŅôśó∂ fu=‚ąíinf‚Ā°f_u=-\\inffu‚Äč=‚ąíinfÔľĆŤ°®Á§ļ uuu ÁöĄŚ≠óś†ĎŚÜÖś≤°śúČŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻśú™ŤĘęŤ¶ÜÁõĖÔľõ Ťč• fu=kf_u=kfu‚Äč=kÔľĆŤĮīśėé vvv ŚŅÖť°ĽŤĘę uuu Ť¶ÜÁõĖšļÜÔľĆŤŅôśó∂ťúÄŤ¶ĀťÄČšł≠ uuuÔľĆŚźĆśó∂śēīś£Ķ uuu ÁöĄŚ≠źś†ĎťÉĹšľöŤĘęŤ¶ÜÁõĖÔľĆŚąô fu=‚ąíinf‚Ā°f_u=-\\inffu‚Äč=‚ąíinfÔľĆgu=0g_u=0gu‚Äč=0ÔľĆans++ans++ans++Ôľõ Ťč• du=1d_u=1du‚Äč=1 šłĒ gu>kg_u>kgu‚Äč>kÔľĆŤĮīśėé uuu śėĮŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻšłĒšłćŤÉĹŤĘęŚģÉŚ≠źś†ĎŚÜÖšĻčŚČćťÄČšł≠ÁöĄÁāĻŤ¶ÜÁõĖÔľĆťā£šĻąśěúśĖ≠šļ§ÁĽôŤá™Ś∑ĪÁöĄÁą∂šļ≤ŚíĆŚÖĄŚľüŚ≠źś†ĎÔľĆfu=max‚Ā°(fu,0)f_u=\\max(f_u,0)fu‚Äč=max(fu‚Äč,0)„Äā ŤŅôšłČÁßćśÉÖŚÜĶśúČŚŹĮŤÉĹŚźĆśó∂śąźÁęčŚ§öÁßćÔľĆšĹÜŚĻ∂šłćšļíÁõłŚĻ≤śČįÔľĆśČÄšĽ•ťúÄŤ¶ĀŚÜôśąźšłČšł™ if ŚĻ∂Ť°Ć„Äā śúÄŚźéś≥®śĄŹŤč• f1‚Č•0f_1\\ge0f1‚Äč‚Č•0 ŤĮīśėéŤŅėśúČŚÖ≥ťĒģÁāĻś≤°ŤĘęŤ¶ÜÁõĖÔľĆÁ≠ČÁĚÄ 111 ŚŹ∑ŤäāÁāĻÁöĄÁą∂šļ≤ŚíĆŚÖĄŚľüŚ≠źś†ĎŤ¶ÜÁõĖŚģÉšĽ¨„ÄāšĹÜśėĮ 111 ŚŹ∑ŤäāÁāĻś≤°śúČÁą∂šļ≤ŚíĆŚÖĄŚľüÔľĆś≠§śó∂Áõīśé•ťÄČšł≠ 111 ŚŹ∑ŤäāÁāĻŚć≥ŚŹĮÔľĆans++ans++ans++„Äā šĺčťĘėšĽ£Á†ĀŚ¶āšłčÔľö #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const long long S=1000005,MS=300005; const int inf=1e8; int n,m,d[MS]; int esum,to[S],nxt[S],h[MS]; int tot,f[MS],g[MS]; inline void add(int x,int y) { to[++esum]=y; nxt[esum]=h[x]; h[x]=esum; } void dfs(int u,int fa,int mid) { f[u]=-inf; g[u]=inf; for(int i=h[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i]; if(v==fa) { continue; } dfs(v,u,mid); f[u]=max(f[u],f[v]+1); g[u]=min(g[u],g[v]+1); } if(f[u]+g[u]<=mid) { f[u]=-inf; } if(d[u]==1&&g[u]>mid) { f[u]=max(f[u],0); } if(f[u]==mid) { f[u]=-inf; g[u]=0; tot++; } } inline bool check(int mid) { tot=0; dfs(1,0,mid); if(f[1]>=0) { tot++; } return tot<=m; } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&d[i]); } for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); add(x,y); add(y,x); } int l=0,r=n,ans=-1; while(l<=r) { int mid=l+r>>1; if(check(mid)) { ans=mid; r=mid-1; } else { l=mid+1; } } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ÁĽÉšĻ†ťĘėÁõģ P3942 ŚįÜŚÜõšĽ§
